articles.title: Excuse me!
articles.question: Whose handbag is it? 这是谁的手袋？

sentences.text: Excuse me!
Yes?
Is this your handbag?
Pardon?
Is this your handbag?
Yes, it is.
Thank you very much.

articles.original_chinese: 对不起！什么事？这是您的手提包吗？对不起，请再说一遍。这是您的手提包吗？是的，是我的。非常感谢！

articles.title: Sorry, sir.
articles.question: Did the man get his umbrella back? 这位男士有没有要回他的雨伞？

sentences.text: My coat and my umbrella please.
sentences.translation: 请把我的大衣和伞拿给我。

sentences.text: Here is my ticket.
sentences.translation: 这是我（寄存东西）的牌子。

sentences.text: Thank you, sir.
Number five.
Here's your umbrella and your coat.
This is not my umbrella.
Sorry sir.
Is this your umbrella?
No, it isn't.
Is this it?
Yes, it is.
Thank you very much.

articles.original_chinese: 请把我的大衣和伞拿给我。这是我（寄存东西）的牌子。谢谢，先生。是5号。这是您的伞和大衣。这不是我的伞。对不起，先生。这把伞是您的吗？不，不是！这把是吗？是，是这把。非常感谢。

articles.title: Nice to meet you
articles.question: Is Chang-woo Chinese? 昌宇是中国人吗？

sentences.text: Good morning.
Good morning, Mr. Blake.
This is Miss Sophie Dupont. Sophie is a new student. She is French.
sentences.translation: 这位是索菲娅·杜邦小姐。索菲娅是个新学生。她是法国人。

sentences.text: Sophie, this is Hans. He is German.
sentences.translation: 索菲娅，这位是汉斯。他是德国人。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you.
And this is Naoko. She's Japanese.
sentences.translation: 这位是直子。她是日本人。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you.
And this is Chang-woo. He's Korean.
sentences.translation: 这位是昌宇。他是韩国人。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you.
And this is Luming. He is Chinese.
sentences.translation: 这位是鲁明。他是中国人。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you.
And this is Xiaohui. She's Chinese, too.
sentences.translation: 这位是晓惠。她也是中国人。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you.

articles.original_chinese: 早上好。早上好，布莱克先生。这位是索菲娅·杜邦小姐。索菲娅是个新学生。她是法国人。索菲娅，这位是汉斯。他是德国人。很高兴见到你。这位是直子。她是日本人。很高兴见到你。这位是昌宇。他是韩国人。很高兴见到你。这位是鲁明。他是中国人。很高兴见到你。这位是晓惠。她也是中国人。很高兴见到你。

articles.title: Are you a teacher?
articles.question: What is Robert's job? 罗伯特是做什么工作的？

sentences.text: I am a new student. My name's Robert.
sentences.translation: 我是个新学生，我的名字叫罗伯特。

sentences.text: Nice to meet you. My name's Sophie.
sentences.translation: 很高兴见到你。我的名字叫索菲娅。

sentences.text: Are you French?
Yes, I am.
Are you French too?
No, I am not.
What nationality are you?
I'm Italian.
Are you a teacher?
No, I'm not.
What's your job?
I'm a keyboard operator.
What's your job?
I'm an engineer.

articles.original_chinese: 我是个新学生，我的名字叫罗伯特。很高兴见到你。我的名字叫索菲娅。你是法国人吗？是的，我是法国人。你也是法国人吗？不，我不是。你是哪国人？我是意大利人。你是教师吗？不，我不是。你是做什么工作的？我是电脑录入员。你是做什么工作的？我是工程师。

articles.title: How are you today?
articles.question: How is Emma? 埃玛身体好吗？

sentences.text: Hello, Helen.
Hi, Steven.
How are you today?
I'm very well, thank you. And you?
I'm fine, thanks.
How is Tony?
He's fine, thanks. How's Emma?
She's very well, too, Helen.
Goodbye, Helen. Nice to see you.
sentences.translation: 再见，海伦。见到你很高兴。

sentences.text: Nice to see you, too, Steven. Goodbye.
sentences.translation: 我见到你也很高兴，史蒂文。再见。

articles.original_chinese: 你好，海伦。你好，史蒂文。你今天好吗？很好，谢谢你。你好吗？很好，谢谢。托尼好吗？他很好，谢谢。埃玛好吗？她也很好，海伦。再见，海伦。见到你很高兴。我见到你也很高兴，史蒂文。再见。

articles.title: Is this your shirt?
articles.question: Whose shirt is white? 谁的衬衣是白色的？

sentences.text: Whose shirt is that?
Is this your shirt, Dave?
No, Sir. It's not my shirt.
sentences.translation: 不，先生。这不是我的衬衫。

sentences.text: This is my shirt. My shirt's blue.
sentences.translation: 这是我的衬衫。我的衬衫是蓝色的。

sentences.text: Is this shirt Tim's?
Perhaps it is, sir. Tim's shirt's white.
sentences.translation: 也许是，先生。蒂姆的衬衫是白色的。

sentences.text: Tim!
Yes, sir?
Is this your shirt?
Yes, sir.
Here you are. Catch!
Thank you, sir.

articles.original_chinese: 那是谁的衬衫？戴夫，这是你的衬衫吗？不，先生。这不是我的衬衫。这是我的衬衫。我的衬衫是蓝色的。这件衬衫是蒂姆的吗？也许是，先生。蒂姆的衬衫是白色的。蒂姆！什么事，先生？这是你的衬衫吗？是的，先生。给你。接着！谢谢您，先生。

articles.title: A new dress
articles.question: What colour is Anna's hat? 安娜的帽子是什么颜色的？

sentences.text: What colour's your new dress?
sentences.translation: 你的新连衣裙是什么颜色的？

sentences.text: It's green.
Come upstairs and see it.
Thank you.
Look! Here it is!
That's a nice dress. It's very smart.
sentences.translation: 这件连衣裙真好，真漂亮。

sentences.text: My hat's new, too.
What colour is it?
It's the same colour. It's green, too.
That is a lovely hat!

articles.original_chinese: 你的新连衣裙是什么颜色的？是绿色的。到楼上来看看吧。谢谢。瞧，就是这件。这件连衣裙真好，真漂亮。我的帽子也是新的。是什么颜色的？一样的颜色，也是绿的。真是一顶可爱的帽子！

articles.title: Your passports, please.
articles.question: Is there a problem with the Customs officer? 海关官员有什么疑问吗？

sentences.text: Are you Swedish?
No, we are not. We are Danish.
sentences.translation: 不，我们不是瑞典人。我们是丹麦人。

sentences.text: Are your friends Danish, too?
sentences.translation: 你们的朋友也是丹麦人吗？

sentences.text: No, they aren't. They are Norwegian.
sentences.translation: 不，他们不是丹麦人。他们是挪威人。

sentences.text: Your passports, please.
Here they are.
Are these your cases?
No, they aren't.
Our cases are brown. Here they are.
sentences.translation: 我们的箱子是棕色的。在这儿呢。

sentences.text: Are you tourists?
Yes, we are.
Are your friends tourists too?
sentences.translation: 你们的朋友也是来旅游的吗？

sentences.text: Yes, they are.
That's fine.
Thank you very much.

articles.original_chinese: 你们是瑞典人吗？不，我们不是瑞典人。我们是丹麦人。你们的朋友也是丹麦人吗？不，他们不是丹麦人。他们是挪威人。请出示你们的护照。给您。这些是你们的箱子吗？不，不是。我们的箱子是棕色的。在这儿呢。你们是来旅游的吗？是的，是来旅游的。你们的朋友也是来旅游的吗？是的，他们也是。好了。非常感谢。

articles.title: How do you do
articles.question: What are Michael Baker and Jeremy Short's jobs? 迈克尔.贝克和杰里米.肖特是做什么工作的？

sentences.text: Come and meet our employees, Mr. Richards.
sentences.translation: 来见见我们的雇员，理查兹先生。

sentences.text: Thank you, Mr. Jackson.
This is Nicola Grey, and this is Claire Taylor.
sentences.translation: 这位是尼克拉·格雷，这位是克莱尔·泰勒。

sentences.text: How do you do?
Those women are very hard-working.
What are their jobs?
They're keyboard operators.
This is Michael Baker, and this is Jeremy Short.
sentences.translation: 这位是迈克尔·贝克，这位是杰里米·肖特。

sentences.text: How do you do?
They aren't very busy!
What are their jobs?
They're sales reps.
They are very lazy.
Who is this young man?
This is Jim.
sentences.translation: 他是吉姆，是我们办公室的勤杂人员。

sentences.text: He is our office assistant.

articles.original_chinese: 来见见我们的雇员，理查兹先生。谢谢，杰克逊先生。这位是尼克拉·格雷，这位是克莱尔·泰勒。你们好！那些姑娘很勤快。她们是做什么工作的？她们是电脑录入员。这位是迈克尔·贝克，这位是杰里米·肖特。你们好！他们不很忙吧！他们是做什么工作的？他们是推销员。他们非常懒。这个年轻人是谁？他是吉姆，是我们办公室的勤杂人员。

articles.title: Tired and thirsty
articles.question: Why do the children thank their mother? 为什么孩子们向母亲致谢？

sentences.text: What's the matter, children?
We are tired and thirsty, Mum.
sentences.translation: 我们累了，而且口喝，妈妈。

sentences.text: Sit down here.
Are you all right now?
No, we aren't.
Look! There's an ice cream man.
Two ice creams please.
Here you are, children.
Thanks, Mum.
These ice creams are nice.
Are you all right now?
Yes, we are, thank you.

articles.original_chinese: 怎么啦，孩子们？我们累了，而且口喝，妈妈。坐在这儿吧。你们现在好些了吗？不，还没有。瞧！有个卖冰淇淋的。请拿两份冰淇淋。拿着，孩子们。谢谢，妈妈。这些冰淇淋真好吃。你们现在好了吗？是的，现在好了，谢谢您！

articles.title: Which book?
articles.question: Which book does the man want? 这位男士要哪本书？

sentences.text: Give me a book please, Jane.
Which book?
This one?
No, not that one. The red one.
sentences.translation: 不，不是那本。是那本红皮的。

sentences.text: This one?
Yes, please.
Here you are.
Thank you.

articles.original_chinese: 请拿本书给我，简。哪一本？是这本吗？不，不是那本。是那本红皮的。这本吗？是的，请给我。给你。谢谢。

articles.title: Which glasses?
articles.question: Which glasses does the man want? 这位男士要哪些杯子？

sentences.text: Give me some glasses please, Jane.
sentences.translation: 请拿几只玻璃杯给我，简。

sentences.text: Which glasses?
These glasses?
No, not those. The ones on the shelf.
sentences.translation: 不，不是那几只。是架子上的那几只。

sentences.text: These?
Yes, please.
Here you are.
Thanks.

articles.original_chinese: 请拿几只玻璃杯给我，简。哪几只？这几只吗？不，不是那几只。是架子上的那几只。这几只？是的，请拿给我。给你。谢谢。

articles.title: Mrs. Smith's kitchen
articles.question: What colour is the electric cooker? 电灶是什么颜色的？

sentences.text: Mrs.
Smith's kitchen is small.
There is a refrigerator in the kitchen.
The refrigerator is white.
It is on the right.
There is an electric cooker in the kitchen.
The cooker is blue.
It is on the left.
There is a table in the middle of the room.
There is a bottle on the table.
The bottle is empty.
There is a cup on the table, too.
The cup is clean.

articles.original_chinese: 史密斯夫人的厨房史密斯夫人的厨房很小。 厨房里有个电冰箱。 冰箱的颜色是白的。 它位于房间右侧。 厨房里有个电灶。 电灶的颜色是蓝的。 它位于房间左侧。 房间的中央有张桌子。 桌子上有个瓶子。 瓶子是空的。 桌子上还有一只杯子。 杯子很干净。

articles.title: Mrs. Smith's living room
articles.question: Where are the books? 书在哪里？

sentences.text: Mrs.
Smith's living room is large.
There is a television in the room.
The television is near the window.
There are some magazines on the television.
There is a table in the room.
There are some newspapers on the table.
There are some armchairs in the room.
The armchairs are near the table.
There is a stereo in the room.
The stereo is near the door.
There are some books on the stereo.
There are some pictures in the room.
The pictures are on the wall.

articles.original_chinese: 史密斯夫人的客厅史密斯夫人的客厅很大。 客厅里有台电视机。 电视机靠近窗子。 电视机上放着几本杂志。 客厅里有张桌子。 桌上放着几份报纸。 客厅里有几把扶手椅。 那些扶手椅靠近桌子。 客厅里有台立体声音响。 音响靠近门。 音响上面有几本书。 客厅里有几幅画。 画挂在墙上。

articles.title: Mrs. Jones's bedroom
articles.question: How must Amy clean the floor? 艾米需要如何来清扫地面？

sentences.text: Come in, Amy.
Shut the door, please.
This bedroom is very untidy.
What must I do, Mrs. Jones?
sentences.translation: 我应该做些什么呢，琼斯夫人？

sentences.text: Open the window and air the room.
sentences.translation: 打开窗户，给房间通通风。

sentences.text: Then put these clothes in the wardrobe.
sentences.translation: 然后把这些衣服放进衣橱里去。

sentences.text: Then make the bed.
Dust the dressing table.
Then sweep the floor.

articles.original_chinese: 进来，艾米。请把门关上。这卧室太不整洁了。我应该做些什么呢，琼斯夫人？打开窗户，给房间通通风。然后把这些衣服放进衣橱里去。再把床整理一下。掸掉梳妆台上的灰尘。然后扫扫地。

articles.title: Where's Sally?
articles.question: Is the cat climbing the tree? 猫正在爬树吗？

sentences.text: Where's Sally, Jack?
She's in the garden, Jane.
What's she doing?
She's sitting under the tree.
Is Tim in the garden, too?
Yes, he is.
He's climbing the tree.
I beg your pardon?
Who's climbing the tree?
Tim is.
What about the dog?
The dog's in the garden, too.
It's running across the grass.
It's running after a cat.

articles.original_chinese: 萨莉在哪儿，杰克？她在花园里，简。她在干什么？她正在树荫下坐着。蒂姆也在花园里吗？是的，他也在花园里。他正在爬树。你说什么？谁在爬树？蒂姆在爬树。那么狗呢？狗也在花园里。它正在草地上跑。它在追一只猫。

articles.title: A fine day
articles.question: Where is the Jones family? 琼斯一家人在哪里？

sentences.text: It's a fine day today.
There are some clouds in the sky, but the sun is shining.
Mr Jones's with his family.
They are walking over the bridge.
There are some boats on the river.
Mr Jones and his wife are looking at them.
Sally is looking at a big ship.
The ship is going under the bridge.
Tim is looking at an aeroplane.
The aeroplane is flying over the river.

articles.original_chinese: 晴天今天天气好。 天空中有几朵云，但阳光灿烂。 琼斯先生同他的家人在一起。 他们正在过桥。 河上有几艘船。 琼斯先生和他的妻子正在看这些船。 莎莉正在看一艘大船。 那船正从桥下驶过。 蒂姆正望着一架飞机。 飞机正从河上飞过。

articles.title: Our village
articles.question: Are the children coming out of the park or going into it? 孩子们是正从公园里出来还正在往里走？

sentences.text: This is a photograph of our village.
Our village is in a valley.
It is between two hills.
The village is on a river.
Here is another photograph of the village.
My wife and I are walking along the banks of the river.
We are on the left.
There is a boy in the water.
He is swimming across the river.
Here is another photograph.
This is the school building.
It is beside a park.
The park is on the right.
Some children are coming out of the building.
Some of them are going into the park.

articles.original_chinese: 我们的村庄这是我们村庄的一张照片。 我们的村庄坐落在一个山谷之中。 它位于两座小山之间。 它靠近一条河流。 这是我们村庄的另一张照片。 我和妻子正在河岸上散步。 我们在河的左侧。 河里面有个男孩。 他正横渡小河。 这是另一张照片。 这是学校大楼。 它位于公园的旁边。 公园在右面。 一些孩子正从楼里出来。 他们中有几个正走进公园。

articles.title: Making a bookcase
articles.question: What is Susan's favourite colour? 苏珊最喜欢哪种颜色？

sentences.text: You're working hard, George.
What are you doing?
I'm making a bookcase.
Give me that hammer please, Dan.
sentences.translation: 请把那把锤子拿给我，丹。

sentences.text: Which hammer?
This one?
No, not that one.
The big one.
Here you are.
Thanks, Dan.
What are you going to do now, George?
sentences.translation: 你现在打算干什么，乔治？

sentences.text: I'm going to paint it.
What colour are you going to paint it?
sentences.translation: 你打算把它漆成什么颜色？

sentences.text: I'm going to paint it pink.
Pink!
This bookcase isn't for me.
sentences.translation: 这个书架不是为我做的。

sentences.text: It's for my daughter, Susan.
sentences.translation: 是为我的女儿苏珊做的。

sentences.text: Pink's her favorite colour.
sentences.translation: 粉红色是她最喜欢的颜色。

articles.original_chinese: 你干得真辛苦，乔治。你在干什么呢？我正在做书架。请把那把锤子拿给我，丹。哪一把？是这把吗？是这把吗？不，不是那把。是那把大的。给你。谢谢，丹。你现在打算干什么，乔治？我打算把它漆一下。你打算把它漆成什么颜色？我想漆成粉红色。粉红色！这个书架不是为我做的。是为我的女儿苏珊做的。粉红色是她最喜欢的颜色。

articles.title: Don't drop it!
articles.question: Where does Sam put the vase in the end? 萨姆把花瓶放在什么地方？

sentences.text: What are you going to do with that vase, Penny?
sentences.translation: 你打算如何处理那个花瓶，彭妮？

sentences.text: I'm going to put it on this table, Sam.
sentences.translation: 我打算把它放在这张桌子上，萨姆。

sentences.text: Don't do that.
Give it to me.
What are you going to do with it?
I'm going to put it here, in front of the window.
sentences.translation: 我准备把它放在这儿，放在窗前。

sentences.text: Be careful.
Don't drop it!
Don't put it there, Sam.
Put it here, on this shelf.
There we are!
It's a lovely vase.
Those flowers are lovely, too.

articles.original_chinese: 你打算如何处理那个花瓶，彭妮？我打算把它放在这张桌子上，萨姆。不要放在那儿。把它给我。你打算怎么办？我准备把它放在这儿，放在窗前。小心点！别摔了！别放在那儿，萨姆。放在这儿，这个架子上。这只花瓶很可爱。那些花也很可爱啊。

articles.title: Penny's bag
articles.question: Who is the tin of tobacco for? 那听烟丝是给谁买的？

sentences.text: Is that bag heavy, Penny?
Not very.
Here!
Put it on this chair.
What's in it?
A piece of cheese.
A loaf of bread.
A bar of soap.
A bar of chocolate.
A bottle of milk.
A pound of sugar.
Half a pound of coffee.
A quarter of a pound of tea.
And a tin of tobacco.
Is that tin of tobacco for me?
Well, it's certainly not for me!

articles.original_chinese: 那个提包重吗，彭妮？不太重。放在这把椅子上。里面是什么东西？一块乳酪。一块面包。一块肥皂。一块巧克力。一瓶牛奶。一磅糖。半磅咖啡。四分之一磅茶叶。还有一听烟丝。那听烟丝是给我的吗？噢，当然不会是给我的！

articles.title: Hurry up!
articles.question: How do you know Sam doesn't make the tea very often? 你怎么知道萨姆不常沏茶？

sentences.text: Can you make the tea, Sam?
Yes, of course I can, Penny.
Is there any water in this kettle?
Yes, there is.
Where's the tea?
It's over there, behind the teapot.
Can you see it?
I can see the teapot, but I can't see the tea.
sentences.translation: 茶壶我看见了，但茶叶没看到。

sentences.text: There it is! It's in front of you.
Ah yes, I can see it now.
Where are the cups?
There are some in the cupboard.
Can you find them?
Yes. Here they are.
Hurry up, Sam. The kettle's boiling.

articles.original_chinese: 你会沏茶吗，萨姆？会的，我当然会，彭妮。壶里有水吗？有水。茶叶在哪儿？就在那儿，茶壶后面。你看见了吗？茶壶我看见了，但茶叶没看到。那不是么！就在你眼前。噢，是啊，我现在看到了。茶杯在哪儿呢？碗橱里有几只。你找得到吗？找得到。就在这儿呢。快，萨姆。水开了！

articles.title: The boss's letter
articles.question: Why can't Pamela type the letter? 帕梅拉为什么无法打信？

sentences.text: Can you come here a minute please, Bob?
Yes, sir?
Where's Pamela?
She's next door. She's in her office, sir.
sentences.translation: 她在隔壁，在她的办公室里，先生。

sentences.text: Can she type this letter for me? Ask her please.
sentences.translation: 她能帮我打一下这封信吗？请问她。

sentences.text: Yes, sir.
Can you type this letter for the boss please, Pamela?
sentences.translation: 请你帮老板打一下这封信好吗，帕梅拉？

sentences.text: Yes, of course I can.
Here you are.
Thank you, Bob.
Bob!
Yes? What's the matter?
I can't type this letter.
I can't read it! The boss's handwriting is terrible!
sentences.translation: 我看不懂这份笔迹，老板的书写太糟糕了！

articles.original_chinese: 请你来一下好吗，鲍勃？什么事，先生？帕梅拉在哪儿？她在隔壁，在她的办公室里，先生。她能帮我打一下这封信吗？请问她。好的，先生。请你帮老板打一下这封信好吗，帕梅拉？可以，当然可以。给你。谢谢你，鲍勃。鲍勃！怎么了？怎么回事？我打不了这封信。我看不懂这份笔迹，老板的书写太糟糕了！

articles.title: A cup of coffee
articles.question: How does Ann like her coffee? 安想要什么样的咖啡？

sentences.text: Do you like coffee, Ann?
Yes, I do.
Do you want a cup?
Yes, please, Christine.
sentences.translation: 好的，请来一杯，克里斯汀。

sentences.text: Do you want any sugar?
Yes, please.
Do you want any milk?
No, thank you. I don't like milk in my coffee. I like black coffee.
sentences.translation: 不，谢谢。我不喜欢咖啡中放牛奶，我喜欢清咖啡。

sentences.text: Do you like biscuits?
Yes, I do.
Do you want one?
Yes, please.

articles.original_chinese: 你喜欢咖啡吗，安？是的，我喜欢。你想要一杯吗？好的，请来一杯，克里斯汀。要放些糖吗？好的。要放些牛奶吗？不，谢谢。我不喜欢咖啡中放牛奶，我喜欢清咖啡。你喜欢饼干吗？是的，我喜欢。你想要一块吗？好的，请来一块。

articles.title: At the butcher's
articles.question: What does Mr. Bird like? 伯德先生喜欢什么？

sentences.text: Do you want any meat today, Mrs. Bird?
sentences.translation: 您今天要肉吗，伯德夫人？

sentences.text: Yes, please.
Do you want beef or lamb?
sentences.translation: 您要牛肉还是要羔羊肉？

sentences.text: Beef, please.
This lamb's very good.
I like lamb, but my husband doesn't.
sentences.translation: 我喜欢羔羊肉，但我丈夫不喜欢。

sentences.text: What about some steak? This is a nice piece.
Give me that piece, please.
And a pound of mince, too.
Do you want a chicken, Mrs. Bird? They're very nice.
sentences.translation: 您要只鸡吗，伯德夫人？这些鸡很好。

sentences.text: No, thank you.
My husband likes steak, but he doesn't like chicken.
sentences.translation: 我丈夫喜欢牛排，但他不喜欢鸡。

sentences.text: To tell you the truth, Mrs. Bird, I don't like chicken either!
sentences.translation: 说实在的，伯德夫人，我也不喜欢鸡！

articles.original_chinese: 您今天要肉吗，伯德夫人？是的，我要一点。您要牛肉还是要羔羊肉？请给我牛肉。这羔羊肉很好。我喜欢羔羊肉，但我丈夫不喜欢。来点牛排吗？这块很好。请给我那块。我还要一磅肉馅。您要只鸡吗，伯德夫人？这些鸡很好。不，谢谢。我丈夫喜欢牛排，但他不喜欢鸡。说实在的，伯德夫人，我也不喜欢鸡！

articles.title: A pleasant climate
articles.question: Does it ever snow in Greece? 希腊下过雪吗？

sentences.text: Where do you come from?
I come from Greece.
What's the climate like in your country?
sentences.translation: 你们国家的气候怎么样？

sentences.text: It's very pleasant.
What's the weather like in spring?
It's often windy in March. It's always warm in April and May, but it rains sometimes.
sentences.translation: 3月里常常刮风。4月和5月的天气总暖洋洋的，但有时下雨。

sentences.text: What's it like in summer?
It's always hot in June, July and August. The sun shines every day.
sentences.translation: 6月、7月和8月的天气总是炎热的，每天都出太阳。

sentences.text: Is it cold or warm in autumn?
sentences.translation: 秋季的天气是冷还是暖呢？

sentences.text: It's always warm in September and October. It's often cold in November and it rains sometimes.
sentences.translation: 9月和10月总是很暖和，11月常常就冷了，而且有时下雨。

sentences.text: Is it very cold in winter?
It's often cold in December, January and February. It snows sometimes.
sentences.translation: 12月、1月和2月常常很冷，有时还下雪。

articles.original_chinese: 你是哪国人？我是希腊人。你们国家的气候怎么样？气候非常宜人。春季的天气怎么样？3月里常常刮风。4月和5月的天气总暖洋洋的，但有时下雨。夏季的天气如何呢？6月、7月和8月的天气总是炎热的，每天都出太阳。秋季的天气是冷还是暖呢？9月和10月总是很暖和，11月常常就冷了，而且有时下雨。冬季的天气很冷吗？12月、1月和2月常常很冷，有时还下雪。

articles.title: An interesting climate
articles.question: What is the favourite subject of conversation in England? 在英国最受欢迎的话题是什么？

sentences.text: Where do you come from?
I come from England.
What's the climate like in your country?
sentences.translation: 你们国家的气候怎么样？

sentences.text: It's mild, but it's not always pleasant.
sentences.translation: 气候温和，但也不总是宜人的。

sentences.text: The weather's often cold in the North and windy in the East. It's often wet in the West and sometimes warm in the South.
sentences.translation: 北部的天气常常寒冷，东部则常常刮风。西部常下雨，南部有时则很暖和。

sentences.text: Which seasons do you like best?
I like spring and summer. The days are long and the nights are short. The sun rises early and sets late.
sentences.translation: 我最喜欢春季和夏季。因为此时白天长而夜晚短。

sentences.text: I don't like autumn and winter. The days are short and the nights are long. The sun rises late and sets early.
Our climate is not very good, but it's certainly interesting. It's our favorite subject of conversation.
sentences.translation: 我不喜欢秋季和冬季。因为此时白天短而夜晚长。
虽然我们国家的气候并不很好，但又确实很有意思。天气是我们最喜欢谈论的话题。

articles.original_chinese: 你是哪国人？我是英国人。你们国家的气候怎么样？气候温和，但也不总是宜人的。北部的天气常常寒冷，东部则常常刮风。西部常下雨，南部有时则很暖和。你最喜欢哪些季节？我最喜欢春季和夏季。因为此时白天长而夜晚短。太阳升得早而落得晚。我不喜欢秋季和冬季。因为此时白天短而夜晚长。太阳升得迟而落得早。虽然我们国家的气候并不很好，但又确实很有意思。天气是我们最喜欢谈论的话题。

articles.title: The Sawyer family
articles.question: When do the children do their homework? 孩子们什么时候做功课？

sentences.text: The Sawyers live at 87 King Street.
In the morning, Mr Sawyer goes to work and the children go to school.
Their father takes them to school every day.
Mrs Sawyer stays at home every day.
She does the housework.
She always eats her lunch at noon.
In the afternoon, she usually sees her friends.
They often drink tea together.
In the evening, the children come home from school.
They arrive home early.
Mr Sawyer comes home from work.
He arrives home late.
At night, the children always do their homework.
Then they go to bed.
Mr Sawyer usually reads his newspaper, but sometimes he and his wife watch television.

articles.original_chinese: 索耶一家人索耶一家住在国王街87号。 早上，索耶先生去上班，孩子们去上学。父亲每天送孩子们去上学。 索耶夫人每天呆在家里。她料理家务。 她总是在正午吃午饭。 下午，她总是会见她的朋友。她们经常在一起喝茶。 傍晚，孩子们放学回家。他们到家很早。 索耶先生下班回家。他到家很晚。 晚上，孩子们总是做作业。然后去睡觉。索耶先生总是读报纸，但有时和他的妻子一起看电视。

articles.title: An unusual day
articles.question: What is Mr. Sawyer doing tonight? 索耶先生今晚正在做什么？

sentences.text: It is eight o'clock.
The children go to school by car every day, but today, they are going to school on foot.
It is ten o'clock.
Mrs Sawyer usually stays at home in the morning, but this morning, she is going to the shops.
It is four o'clock.
In the afternoon, Mrs Sawyer usually drinks tea in the living-room, but this afternoon, she is drinking tea in the garden.
It is six o'clock.
In the evening, the children usually do their homework, but this evening, they are not doing their homework.
At the moment, they are playing in the garden.
It is nine o'clock.
Mr.
Sawyer usually reads his newspaper at night, but he is not reading his newspaper tonight.
At the moment, he is reading an interesting book.

articles.original_chinese: 不平常的一天现在是8点钟。孩子们每天都乘小汽车去上学，而今天，他们正步行上学。 现在是10点钟。上午，索耶夫人通常是呆在家里的，但今天上午，她正去商店买东西。 现在是4点钟，下午，索耶夫人通常是在客厅里喝茶，但今天下午，她正在花园里喝茶。 现在是6点钟。晚上，孩子们通常是做作业，而今天晚上，他们没做作业。此刻，他们正在花园里玩。 现在是9点钟。索耶先生通常是在晚上看报，但今天晚上他没看报。此刻，他正在看一本有趣的书。

articles.title: Is that all?
articles.question: Does the lady buy any chalk? 这位女士有没有买粉笔？

sentences.text: I want some envelopes please.
Do you want the large size, or the small size?
sentences.translation: 您要大号的还是小号的？

sentences.text: The large size please.
Do you have any writing-paper?
Yes, we do.
I don't have any small pads. I only have large ones. Do you want a pad?
sentences.translation: 我没有小本的信纸，只有大本的。您要一本吗？

sentences.text: Yes, please.
And I want some glue.
A bottler of glue.
And I want a large box of chalk, too.
I only have small boxes. Do you want one?
sentences.translation: 我只有小盒的。您要一盒吗？

sentences.text: No, thank you.
Is that all?
That's all, thank you.
What else do you want?
I want my change.

articles.original_chinese: 请给我拿几个信封。您要大号的还是小号的？请拿大号的。您有信纸吗？有。我没有小本的信纸，只有大本的。您要一本吗？好，请拿一本。我还想要一些胶水。一瓶胶水。我还要一大盒粉笔。我只有小盒的。您要一盒吗？不了，谢谢。就要这些吗？就这些，谢谢。您还要什么吗？我要找的零钱。

articles.title: A bad cold
articles.question: What is good news for Jimmy? 吉米有什么好消息？

sentences.text: Where's Jimmy?
He's in bed.
What's the matter with him?
He feels ill.
He looks ill.
We must call the doctor.
Yes, we must.
Can you remember the doctor's telephone number?
sentences.translation: 你还得医生的电话号码吗？

sentences.text: Yes. It's 09754.
Open your mouth, Jimmy. Show me your tongue. Say, 'Ah'.
sentences.translation: 把嘴张开，吉米。让我们看看你的舌头。说"啊——"

sentences.text: What's the matter with him, doctor?
He has a bad cold, Mr Williams, so he must stay in bed for a week.
sentences.translation: 他得了重感冒，威廉斯先生，因此他必须卧床一周。

sentences.text: That's good news for Jimmy.
sentences.translation: 对吉米来说，这可是个好消息。

sentences.text: Good news? Why?
Because he doesn't like school!

articles.original_chinese: 吉米在哪儿？他躺在床上。他怎么啦？他觉得不舒服。他看上去是病了。我们得去请医生。是的，一定得请。你还得医生的电话号码吗？记得。是09754。把嘴张开，吉米。让我们看看你的舌头。说"啊——"他得了什么病，医生？他得了重感冒，威廉斯先生，因此他必须卧床一周。对吉米来说，这可是个好消息。好消息？为什么？因为他不喜欢上学。

articles.title: Thank you, doctor.
articles.question: Who else is in bed today? Why? 还有谁今天也卧床休息？为什么？

sentences.text: How's Jimmy today?
He's better, thank you, doctor.
Can I see him please, Mrs Williams?
sentences.translation: 我可以看看他吗，威廉斯夫人？

sentences.text: Certainly, doctor. Come upstairs.
You look very well, Jimmy. You are better now, but you mustn't get up yet. You must stay in bed for another two days.
sentences.translation: 你看上去很好，吉米。你现在好些了，但你还不应该起床。你必须再卧床两天。

sentences.text: The boy mustn't go to school yet, Mrs Williams. And he mustn't eat rich food.
sentences.translation: 这孩子还不能去上学，威廉斯夫人，而且不能吃油腻的食物。

sentences.text: Does he have a temperature, doctor?
No, he doesn't.
Must he stay in bed?
Yes. He must remain in bed for another two days. He can get up for about two hours each day, but you must keep the room warm.
sentences.translation: 是的，他还必须卧床两天。他每天可以起来两个小时，但您必须保持房间温暖。

sentences.text: Where's Mr Williams this evening?
sentences.translation: 威廉斯先生今晚去哪儿了？

sentences.text: He's in bed, doctor. Can you see him, please? He has a bad cold, too!
sentences.translation: 他在床上呢，医生。您能看看他吗？他也得了重感冒！

articles.original_chinese: 吉米今天怎么样了？他好些了。谢谢您，医生。我可以看看他吗，威廉斯夫人？当然可以，医生。上楼吧。你看上去很好，吉米。你现在好些了，但你还不应该起床。你必须再卧床两天。这孩子还不能去上学，威廉斯夫人，而且不能吃油腻的食物。他还发烧吗，医生？不，他不发烧了。他还必须卧床吗？是的，他还必须卧床两天。他每天可以起来两个小时，但您必须保持房间温暖。威廉斯先生今晚去哪儿了？他在床上呢，医生。您能看看他吗？他也得了重感冒！

articles.title: Not a baby
articles.question: Does Jill take the key to the front door? 吉尔有没有拿到大门的钥匙？

sentences.text: What are you going to do this evening, Jill?
sentences.translation: 今晚你打算干什么，吉尔？

sentences.text: I'm going to meet some friends, Dad.
sentences.translation: 我打算去看几个朋友，爸爸。

sentences.text: You mustn't come home late. You must be home at half past ten.
sentences.translation: 你不准回家太晚，你必须在10点半到家。

sentences.text: I can't get home so early, Dad. Can I have the key to the front door, please?
sentences.translation: 这么早我到不了家，爸爸！

sentences.text: NO, you can't.
sentences.translation: 我能带上前门的钥匙吗？

sentences.text: Jill's eighteen years old, Tom. She's not a baby. Give her the key. She always comes home early.
Oh, all right!
sentences.translation: 吉尔都18岁了，汤姆。她不是小孩子了。把钥匙给她吧。她总早早回家的。

sentences.text: Here you are. But you mustn't come home after a quarter past eleven. Do you hear?
Yes, Dad.
sentences.translation: 拿去。但你不能超过11点1刻回家。听见了吗？

sentences.text: Thanks, Mum.
That's all right. Goodbye. Enjoy yourself!
We always enjoy ourselves, Mum. Bye, bye.

sentences.translation: 我们总是玩得很开心的，妈妈。再见。

articles.original_chinese: 今晚你打算干什么，吉尔？我打算去看几个朋友，爸爸。你不准回家太晚，你必须在10点半到家。这么早我到不了家，爸爸！我能带上前门的钥匙吗？不行，你不能带。吉尔都18岁了，汤姆。她不是小孩子了。把钥匙给她吧。她总早早回家的。那么，好吧！拿去。但你不能超过11点1刻回家。听见了吗？听见了，爸爸。谢谢，妈妈。不用谢。再见。好好玩吧！我们总是玩得很开心的，妈妈。再见。

articles.title: The weekend
articles.question: What are the Johnsons going to do at the weekend? 约翰逊夫妇周末准备做什么？

sentences.text: Hello. Were you at the butcher's?
sentences.translation: 您好。刚才您在肉店里吗？

sentences.text: Yes. I was. Were you at the butcher's, too?
sentences.translation: 是的，我在肉店里。您也在肉店里吗？

sentences.text: No, I wasn't. I was at the greengrocer's. How's Jimmy today?
sentences.translation: 不，我不是。我在蔬菜水果店里。吉米今天怎么样？

sentences.text: He's very well, thank you.
Was he absent from school last week?
Yes, he was. He was absent on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday. How are you all keeping?
sentences.translation: 是的，他没上学。他星期一、星期二、星期三和星期四没去上学。你们身体都好吗？

sentences.text: Very well, thank you. We're going to spend three days in the country. We're going to stay at my mother's for the week-end.
sentences.translation: 很好，谢谢您。我们打算到乡下去三天，在我母亲家度周末。

sentences.text: Friday, Saturday and Sunday in the country! Aren't you lucky!
sentences.translation: 星期五、星期六和星期日在乡下过！你们真幸运啊！

articles.original_chinese: 您好。刚才您在肉店里吗？是的，我在肉店里。您也在肉店里吗？不，我不是。我在蔬菜水果店里。吉米今天怎么样？他很好，谢谢您。上星期他没上学吧？是的，他没上学。他星期一、星期二、星期三和星期四没去上学。你们身体都好吗？很好，谢谢您。我们打算到乡下去三天，在我母亲家度周末。星期五、星期六和星期日在乡下过！你们真幸运啊！

articles.title: The car race
articles.question: Which car was the winner in 1995? 哪辆车在1995年的比赛中获胜？

sentences.text: There is a car race near our town every year.
In 1995, there was a very big race.
There were hundreds of people there.
My wife and I were at the race.
Our friends, Julie and Jack were there, too.
You can see us in the crowd.
We are standing on the left.
There were twenty cars in the race.
There were English cars, French cars, German cars, Italian cars, American cars and Japanese cars.
It was an exciting finish.
The winner was Billy Stewart.
He was in car number fifteen.
Five other cars were just behind him.
On the way home, my wife said to me, "Don't drive so quickly!
You're not Billy Stewart!"

articles.original_chinese: 汽车比赛在我们镇子附近每年都有一场汽车比赛。1995年举行了一次盛大的比赛。许许多多人都去了赛场。我和我的妻子也去了。我们的朋友朱莉和杰克也去了。你可以在人群中看到我们。我们站在左面。参加比赛的有20辆汽车。有英国、法国、德国、意大利和日本的汽车。比赛的结尾是激动人心的。获胜者是比利.斯图尔特。他在第15号车里，其他5辆汽车跟在他后面。在回家的途中，我妻子对我说："别开得这样快！你可不是比利.斯图尔特！"

articles.title: He's awful!
articles.question: How did Pauline answer the telephone at nine o'clock? 波淋在9点接电话时是如何说的？

sentences.text: What's Ron Marston like, Pauline?
sentences.translation: 波淋，朗.马顿是怎样一个人？

sentences.text: He's awful! He telephoned me four times yesterday, and three times the day before yesterday.
sentences.translation: 他讨厌透了！他昨天给我打了4次电话前天打了3次。

sentences.text: He telephoned the office yesterday morning and yesterday afternoon. My boss answered the telephone.
sentences.translation: 他昨天上午和下午把电话打到了我的办公室，是我的老板接的。

sentences.text: What did your boss say to him?
sentences.translation: 你老板是怎么对他说的？

sentences.text: He said, "Pauline is typing letters. She can't speak to you now!"
sentences.translation: 他说："波淋正在打信，她现在不能同你讲话！"

sentences.text: Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening. He telephoned again. But I didn't answer the phone!
sentences.translation: 后来，我昨晚6点钟回到家里。他又打来电话，但我没接。

sentences.text: Did he telephone again last night?
sentences.translation: 他昨夜里又打电话了吗？

sentences.text: Yes, he did. He telephoned at nine o'clock.
sentences.translation: 是的，打了。他在9点钟又打电话。

sentences.text: What did you say to him?
I said, "This is Pauline's mother. Please don't telephone my daughter again!"
sentences.translation: 我说："我是波淋的母亲。请不要再给我女儿打电话了！"

sentences.text: Did he telephone again?
No, he didn't!

articles.original_chinese: 波淋，朗.马顿是怎样一个人？他讨厌透了！他昨天给我打了4次电话前天打了3次。他昨天上午和下午把电话打到了我的办公室，是我的老板接的。你老板是怎么对他说的？他说："波淋正在打信，她现在不能同你讲话！"后来，我昨晚6点钟回到家里。他又打来电话，但我没接。他昨夜里又打电话了吗？是的，打了。他在9点钟又打电话。你对他怎么说的？我说："我是波淋的母亲。请不要再给我女儿打电话了！"他又打了没有？没有！

articles.title: The way to King Street
articles.question: Why did the man need a phrasebook? 为什么这位男士需要一本常用语手册？

sentences.text: Last week Mrs Mills went to London.
She does not know London very well, and she lost her way.
Suddenly, she saw a man near a bus-stop.
"I can ask him the way."
She said to herself.
"Excuse me," she said.
"Can you tell me the way to King Street please?"
The man smiled pleasantly.
He did not understand English!
He spoke German.
He was a tourist.
Then he put his hand into his pocket, and took out a phrase-book.
He opened the book and found a phrase.
He read the phrase slowly."
I am sorry," he said.
"I do not speak English."

articles.original_chinese: 到国王街的走法上星期米尔斯夫人去了伦敦。她对伦敦不很熟悉，因此迷了路。突然，她在公共汽车站附近看到一个男人。"我可以向他问路，"她想。"对不起，您能告诉我到国王街怎么走吗？"她说。这人友好地笑了笑。他不懂英语！他讲德语。他是个旅游者。然后他把手伸进了衣袋，掏出了一本常用语手册。他翻开书找到了一条短语。他缓慢地读着短语。"很抱歉，"他说，"我不会讲英语。"

articles.title: Uncomfortable shoes
articles.question: What's wrong with the fashionable shoes? 这些时髦的鞋有什么毛病？

sentences.text: Do you have any shoes like these?
sentences.translation: 像这样的鞋子你们有吗？

sentences.text: What size?
Size five.
What colour?
Black.
I'm sorry. We don't have any.
But my sister bought this pair last month.
sentences.translation: 但是，我姐姐上个月买到了这样的一双

sentences.text: Did she buy them here?
No, she bought them in the U.S.
We had some shoes like those a month ago, but we don't have any now.
sentences.translation: 一个月前我们有这样的鞋, 但是现在没有了

sentences.text: Can you get a pair for me please?
I'm afraid that I can't. They were in fashion last year and the year before last. But they're not in fashion this year.
sentences.translation: 恐怕不行。这鞋在去年和前年时兴，而今年已不流行了。

sentences.text: These shoes are in fashion now.
sentences.translation: 现在流行的是这种鞋子。.

sentences.text: They look very uncomfortable.
sentences.translation: 这种鞋子看上去很不舒适。

sentences.text: They are very uncomfortable. But women always wear uncomfortable shoes!
sentences.translation: 的确很不舒适。可是女人们总是穿不舒适的鞋子！

articles.original_chinese: 像这样的鞋子你们有吗？什么尺码的？5号的.什么颜色？黑的.对不起，我们没有。但是，我姐姐上个月买到了这样的一双她是在这儿买的吗？不。她是在美国买的。一个月前我们有这样的鞋, 但是现在没有了您能为我找一双吗？恐怕不行。这鞋在去年和前年时兴，而今年已不流行了。现在流行的是这种鞋子。.这种鞋子看上去很不舒适。的确很不舒适。可是女人们总是穿不舒适的鞋子！

articles.title: Terrible toothache
articles.question: What time of day is it, do you think? How do you know? 你认为现在是几点钟？你怎么知道的？

sentences.text: Good morning, Mr Croft.
Good morning, nurse. I want to see the dentist, please.
sentences.translation: 早上好，护士。我想见牙科医生。

sentences.text: Do you have an appointment?
No, I don't.
Is it urgent?
Yes, it is. It's very urgent. I feel awful. I have a terrible toothache.
sentences.translation: 是的，很急。我难受极了,牙痛得要命。

sentences.text: Can you come at 10 am on Monday, April 24th?
sentences.translation: 您在4月24日星期一上午10点钟来行吗？

sentences.text: I must see the dentist now, nurse.
sentences.translation: 我必须现在就见牙科医生，护士。

sentences.text: The dentist is very busy at the moment. Can you come at 2:00 PM?
sentences.translation: 牙科医生这会儿很忙。您下午两点钟来行吗？

sentences.text: That's very late. Can't the dentist see me now?
sentences.translation: 那就太晚了。牙科医生现在就不能给我看一下吗？

sentences.text: I'm afraid that he can't, Mr Croft. Can't you wait till this afternoon?
sentences.translation: 恐怕不能，克罗夫特先生。您就不能等到今天下午吗？

sentences.text: I can wait, but my toothache can't!
sentences.translation: 我倒是可以等。可是我的牙痛等不了啊！

articles.original_chinese: 早上好，克罗夫特先生。早上好，护士。我想见牙科医生。您约好了吗？没有。急吗？是的，很急。我难受极了,牙痛得要命。您在4月24日星期一上午10点钟来行吗？我必须现在就见牙科医生，护士。牙科医生这会儿很忙。您下午两点钟来行吗？那就太晚了。牙科医生现在就不能给我看一下吗？恐怕不能，克罗夫特先生。您就不能等到今天下午吗？我倒是可以等。可是我的牙痛等不了啊！

articles.title: Carol's shopping-list
articles.question: What is Carol not going to buy? 卡罗尔不准备买什么？

sentences.text: What are you doing, Carol?
I'm making a shopping-list, Tom.
What do we need?
We need a lot of things this week.
sentences.translation: 这星期我们需要很多东西。

sentences.text: I must go to the grocer's. We haven't got much tea or coffee, and we haven't got any sugar or jam.
sentences.translation: 我得去一下食品店。我们的茶叶和咖啡不多了，糖和果酱也没有了。

sentences.text: What about vegetables?
I must go to the greengrocer's. We haven't got many tomatoes, but we've got a lot of potatoes.
sentences.translation: 我还得到蔬菜水果店去一下。我们番茄不多了，但土豆还有不少。

sentences.text: I must go to the butcher's, too. We need some meat. We haven't got any meat at all.
sentences.translation: 我还要到肉店去一下。我们需要些肉。我们一点肉也没有了。

sentences.text: Have we got any beer and wine?
sentences.translation: 我们还有啤酒和葡萄酒吗？

sentences.text: No, we haven't. And I'm not going to get any!
sentences.translation: 没有了。不过，我不打算去买！

sentences.text: I hope that you've got some money.
I haven't got much.
Well, I haven't got much either!

articles.original_chinese: 卡罗尔，你在干什么？我在写购物单，汤姆。我们都需要什么？这星期我们需要很多东西。我得去一下食品店。我们的茶叶和咖啡不多了，糖和果酱也没有了。蔬菜呢？我还得到蔬菜水果店去一下。我们番茄不多了，但土豆还有不少。我还要到肉店去一下。我们需要些肉。我们一点肉也没有了。我们还有啤酒和葡萄酒吗？没有了。不过，我不打算去买！我希望你还有钱。我的钱不多了。好吧，我也没啥钱！

articles.title: Roast beef and potatoes
articles.question: Why is Carol disappointed? 为什么卡罗尔感到失望？

sentences.text: Hello, Carol! Where's Tom?
sentences.translation: 你好，卡罗尔！汤姆在哪儿？

sentences.text: He's upstairs. He's having a bath.
Tom!
Yes?
Sam's here.
I'm nearly ready.
Hello, Sam. Have a cigarette.
No thanks, Tom.
Have a glass of whisky then.
O.K. Thanks.
Is dinner ready, Carol?
It's nearly ready. We can have dinner at seven o'clock.
sentences.translation: 马上就好。7点钟我们可以吃饭。

sentences.text: Sam and I had lunch together today. We went to a restaurant.
sentences.translation: 我和萨姆今天一起吃的午饭。我们去了一家饭店。

sentences.text: What did you have?
We had roast beef and potatoes.
sentences.translation: 我们吃的是烤牛肉和土豆。

sentences.text: Oh!
What's the matter, Carol?
Well, you're going to have roast beef and potatoes again tonight!
sentences.translation: 唉，今晚你们又要吃烤牛肉和土豆了！

articles.original_chinese: 你好，卡罗尔！汤姆在哪儿？他在楼上。他正在洗澡。汤姆！什么事？萨姆来了。我马上就好。你好，萨姆。请抽烟。不，谢谢，汤姆。那么，来杯威士忌吧。好的，谢谢。卡罗尔，饭好了吗？马上就好。7点钟我们可以吃饭。我和萨姆今天一起吃的午饭。我们去了一家饭店。你们吃了什么？我们吃的是烤牛肉和土豆。噢！怎么了，卡罗尔？唉，今晚你们又要吃烤牛肉和土豆了！

articles.title: Going on holiday
articles.question: Where did Sam go for his holiday this year? 今年萨姆去了什么地度假？

sentences.text: Hello, Sam. Come in.
Hi, Sam. We're having lunch. Do you want to have lunch with us?
sentences.translation: 你好，萨姆。我们正在吃午饭，你跟我们一起吃午饭好吗？

sentences.text: No thank you, Tom. I've already had lunch. I had lunch at half past twelve.
sentences.translation: 不，汤姆，谢谢。我已经吃过饭了。我在12点半吃的。

sentences.text: Have a cup of coffee then.
I've just had a cup, thank you. I had one after my lunch.
sentences.translation: 我刚喝了一杯，谢谢。我是在饭后喝的。

sentences.text: Let's go into the living-room, Carol. We can have our coffee there.
sentences.translation: 我们到客厅里去吧，卡罗尔。我们可以在那里喝咖啡。

sentences.text: Excuse the mess, Sam. This room's very untidy. We're packing our suitcases. We're going to leave tomorrow. Tom and I are going to have a holiday.
sentences.translation: 屋子很乱，请原谅，萨姆。屋子里乱七八糟。我们正在收拾手提箱。明天我们就要走了。我和汤姆准备去度假。

sentences.text: Aren't you lucky!
When are you going to have a holiday, Sam?
sentences.translation: 萨姆，你准备什么时候去度假？

sentences.text: I don't know. I've already had my holiday this year.
sentences.translation: 我不知道。今年我已度过假了。

sentences.text: Where did you go?
I stayed at home!

articles.original_chinese: 你好，萨姆。进来吧。你好，萨姆。我们正在吃午饭，你跟我们一起吃午饭好吗？不，汤姆，谢谢。我已经吃过饭了。我在12点半吃的。那么喝杯咖啡吧。我刚喝了一杯，谢谢。我是在饭后喝的。我们到客厅里去吧，卡罗尔。我们可以在那里喝咖啡。屋子很乱，请原谅，萨姆。屋子里乱七八糟。我们正在收拾手提箱。明天我们就要走了。我和汤姆准备去度假。你们真幸运！萨姆，你准备什么时候去度假？我不知道。今年我已度过假了。你去哪儿了？我呆在这里了！

articles.title: Paris in the spring
articles.question: At what time of year did Ken visit Paris? 肯是在什么季节访问巴黎的？

sentences.text: Hello, Ken.
Hi, George.
Have you just been to the cinema?
Yes, I have.
What's on?
"Paris in the Spring".
Oh, I've already seen it. I saw it on television last year. It's an old film, but it's very good.
sentences.translation: 噢，我已看过了。我是去年在电视上看的。这是老部片子，但很好。

sentences.text: Paris is a beautiful city.
I've never been there. Have you ever been there, Ken?
sentences.translation: 我从未去过。肯，你去过吗？

sentences.text: Yes, I have. I was there in April.
sentences.translation: 是的，我去过。4月份我在那儿。

sentences.text: Paris in the spring, eh?
It was spring, but the weather was awful. It rained all the time.
sentences.translation: 是春天，但天气太糟了。一直在下雨。

sentences.text: Just like London!

articles.original_chinese: 你好，肯。你好，乔治。你刚去过电影院吗？是的，我刚去过。上映什么片子？《巴黎之春》。噢，我已看过了。我是去年在电视上看的。这是老部片子，但很好。巴黎是座美丽的城市。我从未去过。肯，你去过吗？是的，我去过。4月份我在那儿。那是巴黎之春，是吗？是春天，但天气太糟了。一直在下雨。就像伦敦一样！

articles.title: A car crash
articles.question: Can the mechanics repair Mr. Wood's car? 修理工能否修复伍德先生的汽车？

sentences.text: Is my car ready yet?
I don't know, sir. What's the number of your car?
sentences.translation: 我不知道，先生。您的汽车牌号是多少？

sentences.text: It's LFZ 312 G.
When did you bring it to us?
I brought it here three days ago.
Ah yes, I remember now.
sentences.translation: 啊，是的，我现在记起来了。

sentences.text: Have your mechanics finished yet?
sentences.translation: 你们的机械师修好了吗？

sentences.text: No, they're still working on it. Let's go into the garage and have a look at it.
sentences.translation: 没有，他们还在修呢。我们到车库去看一下吧。

sentences.text: Isn't that your car?
Well, it was my car.
Didn't you have a crash?
That's right. I drove it into a lamp post. Can your mechanics repair it?
sentences.translation: 是啊。我把汽车撞在电线杆上了。你们的机械师能修好吗？

sentences.text: Well, they're trying to repair it, sir. But to tell you the truth, you need a new car.
sentences.translation: 啊，他们正设法修呢，先生。不过说实在的，您需要一辆新车了。

articles.original_chinese: 我的汽车修好了吗？我不知道，先生。您的汽车牌号是多少？是 LFZ312G。您什么时候送来的？3天前。啊，是的，我现在记起来了。你们的机械师修好了吗？没有，他们还在修呢。我们到车库去看一下吧。这难道不是您的车吗？唔，这曾是我的车。难说您没有出车祸吗？是啊。我把汽车撞在电线杆上了。你们的机械师能修好吗？啊，他们正设法修呢，先生。不过说实在的，您需要一辆新车了。

articles.title: For sale
articles.question: Why couldn't Nigel decide? 为什么奈杰尔作不了决定？

sentences.text: Good afternoon. I believe that this house is for sale.
sentences.translation: 下午好。我想这房子是要出售的吧！

sentences.text: That's right.
May I have a look at it please?
Yes, of course. Come in.
How long have you lived here?
sentences.translation: 您在这里住了多长时间？

sentences.text: I have lived here for twenty years.
Twenty years! That's a long time.
Yes, I have been here since 1976.
sentences.translation: 是啊，从1976年起我就住在这里。

sentences.text: Then why do you want to sell it?
sentences.translation: 那么，您为什么要卖掉它呢？

sentences.text: Because I have just retired. I want to buy a small house in the country.
sentences.translation: 因为我刚退休。我想在乡下买幢小房子。

sentences.text: How much does this house cost?
That's a lot of money!
It's worth every penny of it.
sentences.translation: 它确确实实值这么多钱。

sentences.text: Well, I like the house, but I can't decide yet. My wife must see it first.
sentences.translation: 啊，我喜欢这房子，但我还不能决定。我妻子必须先来看一看。

sentences.text: Women always have the last word.
sentences.translation: 女人总是最后说了算的。

articles.original_chinese: 下午好。我想这房子是要出售的吧！是的。我可以看一看吗？可以，当然可以。请进。您在这里住了多长时间？我在这里住了20年了。20年！这个时间可不短。是啊，从1976年起我就住在这里。那么，您为什么要卖掉它呢？因为我刚退休。我想在乡下买幢小房子。这座房子卖多少钱？68,500英镑。我可真是一大笔钱呢！它确确实实值这么多钱。啊，我喜欢这房子，但我还不能决定。我妻子必须先来看一看。女人总是最后说了算的。

articles.title: Poor Ian
articles.question: Who wanted to sell the house? 谁想卖房？

sentences.text: Has Ian sold his house yet?
sentences.translation: 伊恩已指他的房子卖掉了吗？

sentences.text: Yes, he has. He sold it last week.
sentences.translation: 是的，卖掉了。他上星期卖掉的。

sentences.text: Has he moved to his new house yet?
No, not yet. He's still here. He's going to move tomorrow.
sentences.translation: 不，还没有。他仍在这里。他打算明天搬家。

sentences.text: When? Tomorrow morning?
No. Tomorrow afternoon. I'll miss him. He has always been a good neighbour.
sentences.translation: 不，明天下午。我会想念他的。他一直是个好邻居。

sentences.text: He's a very nice person. We'll all miss him.
sentences.translation: 他是个非常好的人，我们大学都会想念他的。

sentences.text: When will the new people move into this house?
sentences.translation: 新住户什么时候搬进这所房子？

sentences.text: I think that they'll move in the day after tomorrow.
sentences.translation: 我想他们将会在后天搬进来吧。

sentences.text: Will you see Ian today, Jenny?
sentences.translation: 詹尼，您今天会见到伊恩吗？

sentences.text: Yes, I will.
Please give him my regards.
Poor Ian! He didn't want to leave this house.
sentences.translation: 可怜的伊恩！他本不想离开这幢房子。

sentences.text: No, he didn't want to leave. but his wife did!
sentences.translation: 是啊，他是不想离开，可是他妻子要离开。

articles.original_chinese: 伊恩已指他的房子卖掉了吗？是的，卖掉了。他上星期卖掉的。他已经迁进新居了吗？不，还没有。他仍在这里。他打算明天搬家。什么时候？明天上午吗？不，明天下午。我会想念他的。他一直是个好邻居。他是个非常好的人，我们大学都会想念他的。新住户什么时候搬进这所房子？我想他们将会在后天搬进来吧。詹尼，您今天会见到伊恩吗？是的，我会见到他。请代我问候他。可怜的伊恩！他本不想离开这幢房子。是啊，他是不想离开，可是他妻子要离开。

articles.title: Our new neighbour
articles.question: Why is Nigel a lucky man? 为什么说奈杰尔很幸运？

sentences.text: Nigel is our new next-door neighbour.
He's a pilot.
He was in the R.
A.
F.
He will fly to New York next month.
The month after next he will fly to Tokyo.
At the moment, he's in Madrid.
He flew to Spain a week ago.
He will return to London the week after next.
He's only forty-one years old, and he has already been to nearly every country in the world.
Nigel is a very lucky man.
But his wife isn't very lucky.
She usually stays at home!

articles.title: Tickets, please.
articles.question: Why did George and Ken miss the train? 为什么乔治和肯误了火车？

sentences.text: Two return tickets to London please. What time will the next train leave?
sentences.translation: 买两张到伦敦的往返票。下一班火车什么时候开？

sentences.text: At nineteen minutes past eight.
Which platform?
Platform Two. Over the bridge.
What time will the next train leave?
sentences.translation: 下一班火车什么时候开？

sentences.text: At eight nineteen.
We've got plenty of time.
It's only three minutes to eight.
Let's go and have a drink. There's a bar next door to the station.
sentences.translation: 让我们去喝点东西吧，车站旁有一个酒吧。

sentences.text: We had better go back to the station now, Ken.
sentences.translation: 肯，我们现在最好回车站去。

sentences.text: Tickets please.
We want to catch the eight nineteen to London.
sentences.translation: 我们要乘8点19分的车去伦敦。

sentences.text: You've just missed it!
sentences.translation: 你们刚好错过了那班车。

sentences.text: What! It's only eight fifteen.
I'm sorry, sir. That clock's ten minutes slow.
sentences.translation: 对不起，先生，那个钟慢了10分钟。

sentences.text: When's the next train?
In five hours' time!

articles.original_chinese: 买两张到伦敦的往返票。下一班火车什么时候开？8点19分。在哪个站台？2号站台。过天桥。下一班火车什么时候开？8点19分。我们时间还很宽裕。现在才7点57分。让我们去喝点东西吧，车站旁有一个酒吧。肯，我们现在最好回车站去。请把车票拿出来。我们要乘8点19分的车去伦敦。你们刚好错过了那班车。什么！现在只有8点15分。对不起，先生，那个钟慢了10分钟。下一班车是什么时候？5个小时以后！

articles.title: A small blue case
articles.question: Does Mr. Hall get his case back? 霍尔先生有没有要回他的提箱？

sentences.text: I left a suitcase on the train to London the other day.
sentences.translation: 几天前我把一只手提箱忘在开往伦敦的火车上了。

sentences.text: Can you describe it, sir?
sentences.translation: 先生，您能描述一下它是什么样子的吗？

sentences.text: It's a small blue case and it's got a zip. There's a label on the handle with my name and address on it.
sentences.translation: 是只蓝色的小箱子，上面有拉链。箱把上有一标签，上面写着我的姓名和住址。

sentences.text: Is this case yours?
No, that's not mine.
What about this one? This one's got a label.
sentences.translation: 这只是不是？这只箱子有张标签。

sentences.text: Let me see it.
What's your name and address?
David Hall, 83, Bridge Street.
That's right. D.N. Hall, 83, Bridge Street.
sentences.translation: 那就对了。D.N.霍尔，大桥街83号。

sentences.text: Three pounds fifty pence, please.
Here you are.
Thank you.
Hey!
What's the matter?
This case doesn't belong to me! You've given me the wrong case!
sentences.translation: 这箱子不是我的！您给错了！

articles.original_chinese: 几天前我把一只手提箱忘在开往伦敦的火车上了。先生，您能描述一下它是什么样子的吗？是只蓝色的小箱子，上面有拉链。箱把上有一标签，上面写着我的姓名和住址。这箱子是您的吗？不，那不是我的。这只是不是？这只箱子有张标签。让我看看。您的姓名和住址？大卫.霍尔，大桥街83号。那就对了。D.N.霍尔，大桥街83号。请付3英镑50便士。给您。谢谢您。嗨！怎么回事？这箱子不是我的！您给错了！

articles.title: Ow!
articles.question: Must Andy go to see the doctor? 安迪需要去看医生吗？

sentences.text: Ow!
What's the matter, Andy?
I slipped and fell downstairs.
sentences.translation: 我滑了一跤，从楼梯上摔下来了。

sentences.text: Have you hurt yourself?
Yes, I have. I think that I've hurt my back.
sentences.translation: 是啊，摔伤了。我想我把背摔坏了。

sentences.text: Try and stand up. Can you stand up? Here. Let me help you.
sentences.translation: 试试站起来。你能站起来吗？来，让我帮你。

sentences.text: I'm sorry, Lucy. I'm afraid that I can't get up.
sentences.translation: 对不起，露西，恐怕我站不起来。

sentences.text: I think that the doctor had better see you. I'll phone Dr. Carter.
sentences.translation: 我想最好请医生来给你看一下。我去给卡特医生打电话。

sentences.text: The doctor says that he will come at once. I'm sure that you need an X-ray, Andy.
sentences.translation: 医生说他马上就来。安迪，我看你需要做一次X光透视。

articles.original_chinese: 啊哟！怎么了，安迪？我滑了一跤，从楼梯上摔下来了。你摔伤了没有？是啊，摔伤了。我想我把背摔坏了。试试站起来。你能站起来吗？来，让我帮你。对不起，露西，恐怕我站不起来。我想最好请医生来给你看一下。我去给卡特医生打电话。医生说他马上就来。安迪，我看你需要做一次X光透视。

articles.title: A card from Jimmy
articles.question: Does Grandmother seem pleased to get a card from Jimmy? Why/Why not? 收到吉米寄来的一张明信片，祖母是否显得高兴？为什么/为什么不高兴？

sentences.text: Read Jimmy's card to me please, Penny.
sentences.translation: 请把吉米的明信片念给我听听，彭妮。

sentences.text: "I have just arrived in Scotland and I'm staying at a Youth Hostel."
sentences.translation: “我刚到苏格兰，我现住在一家青年招待所。”

sentences.text: Eh?
He says he's just arrived in Scotland. He says he's staying at a Youth Hostel. You know he's a member of the Y.H.A.
sentences.translation: 他说他刚到苏格兰。他说他住在一家青年招待所。你知道，他是"青招协"的一个成员。

sentences.text: The what?
The Y.H.A., Mum. The Youth Hostel's Association.
sentences.translation: "青招协"，妈妈。青年招待所协会。

sentences.text: What else does he say?
"I'll write a letter soon. I hope you are all well."
sentences.translation: “我很快会写信的。祝你们大家身体都好。”

sentences.text: What? Speak up, Penny. I'm afraid I can't hear you.
sentences.translation: 什么？彭妮，大声一点。我可听不见你念的。

sentences.text: He says he'll write a letter soon. He hopes we are all well. "Love, Jimmy."
sentences.translation: 他说他很快会写信的。他祝我们大家身体好。"谨此问候，吉米。"

sentences.text: Is that all? He doesn't say very much, does he?
sentences.translation: 就这些吗？他没写许多，是吗？

sentences.text: He can't write very much on a card, Mum.
sentences.translation: 在明信片上他写不了很多，妈妈。

articles.original_chinese: 请把吉米的明信片念给我听听，彭妮。“我刚到苏格兰，我现住在一家青年招待所。”什么？他说他刚到苏格兰。他说他住在一家青年招待所。你知道，他是"青招协"的一个成员。什么？"青招协"，妈妈。青年招待所协会。他还说了些什么？“我很快会写信的。祝你们大家身体都好。”什么？彭妮，大声一点。我可听不见你念的。他说他很快会写信的。他祝我们大家身体好。"谨此问候，吉米。"就这些吗？他没写许多，是吗？在明信片上他写不了很多，妈妈。

articles.title: The French test
articles.question: How long did the exam last? 考试持续了多长时间？

sentences.text: How was the exam, Richard?
Not too bad. I think I passed in English and Mathematics. The questions were very easy. How about you, Gary?
sentences.translation: 不算太坏，我想我的英语和数学及格了。题目很容易。加里，你怎么样？

sentences.text: The English and Maths papers weren't easy enough for me. I hope I haven't failed.
sentences.translation: 英语和数学试题对我来说不很容易。我希望别不及格。

sentences.text: I think I failed the French paper. I could answer sixteen of the questions. They were very easy. But I couldn't answer the rest. They were too difficult for me.
sentences.translation: 我想我的法语及不了格，我能回答其中的16道题。这些题很容易。但我回答不出其它的题。那些题对我来说太难了。

sentences.text: French tests are awful, aren't they?
I hate them. I'm sure I've got a low mark
sentences.translation: 我讨厌法语。我的法语成绩肯定很低。

sentences.text: Oh, cheer up! Perhaps we didn't do too badly. The guy next to me wrote his name at the top of the paper.
sentences.translation: 啊，别灰心！或许我们考得还不太糟。我旁边那人只在试卷顶端写自己的名字。

sentences.text: Yes?
Then he sat there and looked at it for three hours! He didn't write a word!
sentences.translation: 然后他就坐在那里，对着考卷看了3个小时，一个字也没写！

articles.original_chinese: 考试考得怎样，理查德？不算太坏，我想我的英语和数学及格了。题目很容易。加里，你怎么样？英语和数学试题对我来说不很容易。我希望别不及格。我想我的法语及不了格，我能回答其中的16道题。这些题很容易。但我回答不出其它的题。那些题对我来说太难了。法语太可怕了，你说呢？我讨厌法语。我的法语成绩肯定很低。啊，别灰心！或许我们考得还不太糟。我旁边那人只在试卷顶端写自己的名字。是吗？然后他就坐在那里，对着考卷看了3个小时，一个字也没写！

articles.title: Full of mistakes
articles.question: What was Sandra's present? 给桑德拉的礼物是什么？

sentences.text: Where's Sandra, Bob? I want her.
sentences.translation: 鲍勃，桑德拉在哪儿？我要找她。

sentences.text: Do you want to speak to her?
Yes, I do. I want her to come to my office. Tell her to come at once.
sentences.translation: 是的，我要她到我的办公室来。叫她马上就来。

sentences.text: Did you want to see me?
Ah, yes, Sandra. How do you spell "intelligent"? Can you tell me?
sentences.translation: 啊，是的，桑德拉。"intelligent"怎样拼写？你能告诉我吗？

sentences.text: I-N-T-E-L-L-I-G-E-N-T.
That's right. You've typed it with only one "L". This letter's full of mistakes. I want you to type it again.
sentences.translation: 对的。但你只打了1个"L"。这封信里错误百出。我要你重打一遍。

sentences.text: Yes, I'll do that. I'm sorry about that.
sentences.translation: 是，我重打。对此我感到很抱歉。

sentences.text: And here's a little present for you.
sentences.translation: 这里有一件小礼物送你。

sentences.text: What is it?
It's a dictionary. I hope it'll help you.
sentences.translation: 是本词典。我希望它能对你有所帮助。

articles.original_chinese: 鲍勃，桑德拉在哪儿？我要找她。您要同她谈话吗？是的，我要她到我的办公室来。叫她马上就来。您找我吗？啊，是的，桑德拉。"intelligent"怎样拼写？你能告诉我吗？I-N-T-E-L-L-I-G-E-N-T。对的。但你只打了1个"L"。这封信里错误百出。我要你重打一遍。是，我重打。对此我感到很抱歉。这里有一件小礼物送你。是什么？是本词典。我希望它能对你有所帮助。

articles.title: It's too small.
articles.question: What kind of dress does the lady want? 这位女士想要什么样的服装？

sentences.text: Do you like this dress, madam?
sentences.translation: 夫人，您喜欢这件衣服吗？

sentences.text: I like the colour very much. It's a lovely dress, but it's too small for me.
sentences.translation: 我很喜欢这颜色。这件漂亮的衣服，可是对我来说太小了。

sentences.text: What about this one? It's a lovely dress. It's very smart. Short skirts are in fashion now. Would you like to try it?
sentences.translation: 这件怎么样？这是件漂亮的衣服，它很时髦。短裙现在很流行。您要试一试吗？

sentences.text: All right.
I'm afraid this green dress is too small for me as well. It's smaller than the blue one.
sentences.translation: 恐怕这件绿色的我穿着也太小了。它比那件蓝色的还要小。

sentences.text: I don't like the colour either. It doesn't suit me at all. I think the blue dress is prettier.
sentences.translation: 我也不喜欢这种颜色。这颜色我穿根本不合适。我认为那件蓝色的更漂亮些。

sentences.text: Could you show me another blue dress? I want a dress like that one, but it must be my size.
sentences.translation: 您能再给我看一件蓝色的吗？我想一件和那件一样的，但必须是我的尺寸。

sentences.text: I'm afraid I haven't got a larger dress. This is the largest dress in the shop.
sentences.translation: 恐怕没有更大的了。这是店里最大一件。

articles.original_chinese: 夫人，您喜欢这件衣服吗？我很喜欢这颜色。这件漂亮的衣服，可是对我来说太小了。这件怎么样？这是件漂亮的衣服，它很时髦。短裙现在很流行。您要试一试吗？好吧。恐怕这件绿色的我穿着也太小了。它比那件蓝色的还要小。我也不喜欢这种颜色。这颜色我穿根本不合适。我认为那件蓝色的更漂亮些。您能再给我看一件蓝色的吗？我想一件和那件一样的，但必须是我的尺寸。恐怕没有更大的了。这是店里最大一件。

articles.title: A good idea
articles.question: What does Jane have with her coffee? 喝咖啡时简吃了什么？

sentences.text: Shall I make some coffee, Jane?
That's a good idea, Charlotte.
It's ready. Do you want any milk?
sentences.translation: 咖啡好了，你要放点奶吗？

sentences.text: Just a little please.
What about some sugar? Two teaspoonfuls?
sentences.translation: 加些糖怎么样？两茶匙行吗？

sentences.text: No, less than that. One and a half teaspoonfuls please. That's enough for me.
sentences.translation: 不，再少一些。请放一勺儿半。那对我已足够了。

sentences.text: That was very nice.
Would you like some more?
Yes, please.
I'd like a cigarette, too. May I have one?
sentences.translation: 我还想抽枝烟。可以给我一枝吗？

sentences.text: Of course. I think there are a few in that box.
sentences.translation: 当然可以。我想那个盒子里有一些。

sentences.text: I'm afraid it's empty.
What a pity!
It doesn't matter.
Have a biscuit instead. Eat more and smoke less!
sentences.translation: 那就吃块饼干吧。多吃点，少抽点！

sentences.text: That's very good advice!

articles.original_chinese: 我来煮点咖啡好吗，简？这是个好主意，夏洛特。咖啡好了，你要放点奶吗？请稍加一点。加些糖怎么样？两茶匙行吗？不，再少一些。请放一勺儿半。那对我已足够了。太好了。你再来点吗？好的，请再来一点。我还想抽枝烟。可以给我一枝吗？当然可以。我想那个盒子里有一些。恐怕盒子是空的。真遗憾！没关系。那就吃块饼干吧。多吃点，少抽点！这是极好的忠告啊！

articles.title: The most expensive model
articles.question: Can Mr. Frith buy the television on instalments? How does it work? 弗里斯先生可以用分期付款方式购买电视机吗？如何操作呢？

sentences.text: I like this television very much. How much does it cost please?
sentences.translation: 我非常喜欢这台电视机。请问它多少钱？

sentences.text: It's the most expensive model in the shop. It costs 500 pounds.
sentences.translation: 这是店里最贵的型号。它的售价是500英镑。

sentences.text: That's too expensive for us. We can't afford all that money.
sentences.translation: 这对我们来说是太贵了。我们花不起那么多钱。

sentences.text: This model's less expensive than that one. It's only 300 pounds. But, of course, it's not as good as the expensive one.
sentences.translation: 这种型号比那种要便宜些。它只要300英镑。但是，它当然没有价钱高那种好。

sentences.text: I don't like this model. The other model's more expensive, but it's worth the money.
sentences.translation: 我不喜欢这种型号。那种型号价格是贵一些，但它值得那么多钱。

sentences.text: Can we buy it on instalments?
sentences.translation: 我们可以用分期付款的方式购买吗？

sentences.text: Of course. You can pay a deposit of 30 pounds, and then 14 pounds a month for 3 years.
sentences.translation: 当然可以。您可以先付30英镑定金，然后每月14镑，三年付清。

sentences.text: Do you like it, dear?
I certainly do, but I don't like the price. You always want the best, but we can't afford it. Sometimes you think you're a millionaire!
sentences.translation: 我当然喜欢，但是我不喜欢这个价钱。你总是要买最好的，可我们买不起，有时候你认为自己是个百万富翁！

sentences.text: Millionaires don't buy things on instalments!
sentences.translation: 百万富翁是不会分期付款买东西的！

articles.original_chinese: 我非常喜欢这台电视机。请问它多少钱？这是店里最贵的型号。它的售价是500英镑。这对我们来说是太贵了。我们花不起那么多钱。这种型号比那种要便宜些。它只要300英镑。但是，它当然没有价钱高那种好。我不喜欢这种型号。那种型号价格是贵一些，但它值得那么多钱。我们可以用分期付款的方式购买吗？当然可以。您可以先付30英镑定金，然后每月14镑，三年付清。你喜欢吗，亲爱的？我当然喜欢，但是我不喜欢这个价钱。你总是要买最好的，可我们买不起，有时候你认为自己是个百万富翁！百万富翁是不会分期付款买东西的！

articles.title: Small changes
articles.question: Who has got some change? 谁有零钱？

sentences.text: Fares please!
Trafalgar Square please.
sentences.translation: 请买一张到特拉法加广场的票。

sentences.text: I'm sorry, sir. I can't change a pound note. Haven't you got any small change?
sentences.translation: 对不起，我找不开10英镑的钞票。您没有零钱吗？

sentences.text: I've got no small change, I'm afraid.
I'll ask some of the passengers.
Have you any small change, sir?
I'm sorry. I've got none.
I haven't got any either.
Can you change this pound note, madam?
sentences.translation: 夫人，您能把这10英镑的钞票换开吗？

sentences.text: I'm afraid I can't.
Neither can I.
I'm very sorry, sir. You must get off the bus. None of our passengers can change this note. They're all millionaires!
sentences.translation: 非常抱歉，先生。您必须下车。我们的乘客中没人能换开这张钞票。他们都是百万富翁！

sentences.text: Except us.
I've got some small change.
So have I.

articles.original_chinese: 请买票！请买一张到特拉法加广场的票。对不起，我找不开10英镑的钞票。您没有零钱吗？恐怕我没有零钱。我来问问其他乘客。先生，您有零钱吗？对不起，我没有。我也没有。夫人，您能把这10英镑的钞票换开吗？恐怕不能。我也不能。非常抱歉，先生。您必须下车。我们的乘客中没人能换开这张钞票。他们都是百万富翁！我们俩除外。我有零钱。我也有。

articles.title: Knock, knock!
articles.question: What does Jim have to drink? 吉姆只能喝什么饮料？

sentences.text: Isn't there anyone at home?
I'll knock again, Helen. Everything's very quiet. I'm sure there's no one at home.
sentences.translation: 海伦，我再敲一次。毫无动静，肯定家里没有人。

sentences.text: But that's impossible. Carol and Tom invited us to lunch. Look through the window.
sentences.translation: 但这是不可能的。卡罗尔和汤姆请我们来吃午饭。从窗子往里看看。

sentences.text: Can you see anything?
Nothing at all.
Let's try the back door.
Look! Everyone's in the garden.
Hello, Helen. Hullo, Jim.
Everybody wants to have lunch in the garden. It's nice and warm out here.
sentences.translation: 大家都想在花园里吃午饭。这外面挺暖和。

sentences.text: Come and have something to drink.
Thanks, Carol. May I have a glass of beer please?
sentences.translation: 谢谢，卡罗尔。给我一杯啤酒好吗？

sentences.text: Beer? There's none left. You can have some lemonade.
sentences.translation: 啤酒？一点都不剩了。你可以喝点柠檬水。

sentences.text: Lemonade!
Don't believe her, Jim. She's only joking. Have some beer!
sentences.translation: 吉姆，别信她的。她只是在开玩笑。喝点啤酒吧！

articles.original_chinese: 家里没有人吗？海伦，我再敲一次。毫无动静，肯定家里没有人。但这是不可能的。卡罗尔和汤姆请我们来吃午饭。从窗子往里看看。你能看见什么吗？什么也看不见。让我们到后门去试试。瞧！大家都在花园里。你好，海伦。你好，吉姆。大家都想在花园里吃午饭。这外面挺暖和。来喝点什么。谢谢，卡罗尔。给我一杯啤酒好吗？啤酒？一点都不剩了。你可以喝点柠檬水。柠檬水！吉姆，别信她的。她只是在开玩笑。喝点啤酒吧！

articles.title: Tommy's breakfast
articles.question: What does she mean by 'change' in the last sentence? 最后一句话中的“change”是什么意思？

sentences.text: 'When my husband was going into the dining-room this morning , he dropped some coins on the floor.
There were coins everywhere.
We looked for them, but we could not find them all.
'While we were having breakfast, our little boy, Tommy, found two small coins on the floor.
He put them both into his mouth.
We both tried to get the coins, but it was too late.
Tommy had already swallowed them!
Later that morning, when I was doing the housework, my husband telephoned me from the office.'
How's Tommy?'
he asked.'
I don't know,' I answered, 'Tommy's been to the lavatory three times this morning, but I haven't had any change yet!'

articles.title: A true story
articles.question: Who called out to the thieves in the dark? 谁在暗处对窃贼喊了一声？

sentences.text: Do you like stories?
I want to tell you a true story.
It happened to a friend of mine a year ago.
While my friend, George, was reading in bed, two thieves climbed into his kitchen.
After they had entered the house, they went into the dining-room.
It was very dark, so they turned on a torch.
Suddenly, they heard a voice behind them.
“What's up?
What's up?
” someone called.
The thieves dropped the torch and ran away as quickly as they could.
George heard the noise and came downstairs quickly.
He turned on the light, but he couldn't see anyone.
The thieves had already gone.
But George's parrot, Henry, was still there.
'What's up, George?'
he called.
'Nothing, Henry,'”' George said and smiled.
'Go back to sleep.'

articles.title: The man in a hat
articles.question: Why didn't Caroline recognize the customer straight away? 为什么卡罗琳没有马上认出那位顾客？

sentences.text: I bought two expensive dictionaries here half an hour ago, but I forgot to take them with me.
sentences.translation: 半小时以前我在这里买了两本很贵的辞典，但是我忘了拿走。

sentences.text: Who served you, sir?
The lady who is standing behind the counter.
sentences.translation: 站在柜台后面的那位女士。

sentences.text: Which books did you buy?
The books which are on the counter.
Did you serve this gentleman half an hour ago, Miss Roberts? He says he's the man who bought these books.
sentences.translation: 卡罗琳，半小时前你接待过这位先生吗？他说他就是买这两本书的人。

sentences.text: I can't remember, sir. The man whom I served was wearing a hat.
sentences.translation: 我记不起来了。我接待的那个人戴着一顶帽子。

sentences.text: Have you got a hat, sir?
Yes, I have.
Would you put it on, please?
All right.
Is this the man that you served, Miss Roberts?
sentences.translation: 卡罗琳，这就是你接待过的那个人吗？

sentences.text: Yes, sir. I recognize him now.
sentences.translation: 是他。我现在认出他来了。

articles.original_chinese: 半小时以前我在这里买了两本很贵的辞典，但是我忘了拿走。是谁接待您的，先生？站在柜台后面的那位女士。您买的是两本什么书？就是柜台上的那两本。卡罗琳，半小时前你接待过这位先生吗？他说他就是买这两本书的人。我记不起来了。我接待的那个人戴着一顶帽子。先生，您有帽子吗？有的，我有帽子。请您把帽子戴上好吗？好吧。卡罗琳，这就是你接待过的那个人吗？是他。我现在认出他来了。

articles.title: A trip to Australia
articles.question: Who is the man with the beard? 那个长着络腮胡子的人是谁？

sentences.text: Look, Scott. This is a photograph I took during my trip to Australia.
sentences.translation: 看，这是我到澳大利来旅行时拍的一张照片。

sentences.text: Let me see it, Mike.
This is a good photograph. Who are these people?
sentences.translation: 这是一张很好的照片。这些人是谁。

sentences.text: They're people I met during the trip.
sentences.translation: 他们是我旅行时认识的人。

sentences.text: That's the ship we traveled on.
sentences.translation: 这是我们所乘的那条船。

sentences.text: What a beautiful ship!
Who's this?
That's the man I told you about. Remember?
sentences.translation: 这就是我跟你说过的那个人。还记得吗？

sentences.text: Ah yes. The one who offered you a job in Australia.
sentences.translation: 啊，记得。就是在澳大利亚给你工作的那个人。

sentences.text: That's right.
Who's this?
Guess!
It's not you, is it?
That's right.
I grew a beard during the trip, but I shaved it off when I came home.
sentences.translation: 我在旅行时留了胡子，但我回到家时就把它刮了。

sentences.text: Why did you shave it off?
My wife didn't like it!

articles.original_chinese: 看，这是我到澳大利来旅行时拍的一张照片。让我看看，迈克。这是一张很好的照片。这些人是谁。他们是我旅行时认识的人。这是我们所乘的那条船。多漂亮的船啊！这是谁？这就是我跟你说过的那个人。还记得吗？啊，记得。就是在澳大利亚给你工作的那个人。对。这是谁？你猜！这不是你，对吗？不，是我。我在旅行时留了胡子，但我回到家时就把它刮了。你为什么把它刮了？我妻子不喜欢！

articles.title: Tea for two
articles.question: Does Susan have tea by herself? 苏珊是一个人喝茶吗？

sentences.text: Can't you come in and have tea now, Peter?
sentences.translation: 彼得，你现在能进来喝茶吗？

sentences.text: Not yet, dear. I must water the garden first.
sentences.translation: 还不能。我得先给花园浇水。

sentences.text: Do you have to water it now?
I'm afraid I must. Look at it! It's terribly dry.
sentences.translation: 恐怕我得现在浇。你看看，干得厉害。

sentences.text: What a nuisance!
Last summer it was very dry, too. Don't you remember? I had to water it every day.
sentences.translation: 去年夏天也是干得很。你记得了吗？我不得不每天浇水。

sentences.text: Well, I'll have tea by myself.
That was quick! Have you finished already?
Yes, dear. Look out of the window.
Good heaven! It's raining. That means you needn't water the garden.
sentences.translation: 下雨了，这就是就是说，你不必给花园浇水了。

sentences.text: That was a pleasant surprise. It means I can have tea, instead.
sentences.translation: 这是意想不能的好事。这意味着我反倒可以喝茶了。

articles.original_chinese: 彼得，你现在能进来喝茶吗？还不能。我得先给花园浇水。你一定得现在浇吗？恐怕我得现在浇。你看看，干得厉害。真讨厌！去年夏天也是干得很。你记得了吗？我不得不每天浇水。好吧，我一个喝茶了。好快啊！你已经浇完了？是的。你看看窗外。下雨了，这就是就是说，你不必给花园浇水了。这是意想不能的好事。这意味着我反倒可以喝茶了。

articles.title: A famous actress
articles.question: Who is only twenty-nine, and why is it so unclear? 谁只有29岁？为什么这件事如此含糊不清？

sentences.text: Can you recognize that woman, Millie?
sentences.translation: 米莉，你能认出那个女人吗？

sentences.text: I think I can, Kate. It must be Karen Marsh, the actress.
sentences.translation: 我想我认得出来，凯特。那一定是女演员卡.马会。

sentences.text: I thought so. Who's that beside her?
sentences.translation: 我也这样想。她旁边的那个人是谁？

sentences.text: That must be Conrad Reeves.
Conrad Reeves, the actor? It can't be. Let me have another look. I think you're right! Isn't he her third husband?
sentences.translation: 康拉德.里弗斯，那个男演员吗？不可能是。让我再看一看。我想你是对的。他不是她的第3个丈夫吗？

sentences.text: No, He must be her fourth or fifth.
sentences.translation: 不，他一定是她的第4个或第5个丈夫。

sentences.text: Doesn't Karen Marsh look old!
She does, doesn't she! I read she's twenty-nine, but she must be at least forty.
sentences.translation: 是的，谁说不是呢！我从报上看到她是29岁，但她一定至少有40岁了。

sentences.text: I'm sure she is.
She was a famous actress when I was still a schoolgirl.
sentences.translation: 当我还是学生时，她就是个著名的演员了。

sentences.text: That was a long time ago, wasn't it?
sentences.translation: 那是好久以前的事了。是吗？

sentences.text: Not that long ago! I'm not more than twenty-nine myself.
sentences.translation: 不，没有那么久。我自己现在还没29岁呢。

articles.original_chinese: 米莉，你能认出那个女人吗？我想我认得出来，凯特。那一定是女演员卡.马会。我也这样想。她旁边的那个人是谁？一定是康拉德.里弗斯。康拉德.里弗斯，那个男演员吗？不可能是。让我再看一看。我想你是对的。他不是她的第3个丈夫吗？不，他一定是她的第4个或第5个丈夫。卡伦看上去不显老嘛！是的，谁说不是呢！我从报上看到她是29岁，但她一定至少有40岁了。我肯定她有40岁了。当我还是学生时，她就是个著名的演员了。那是好久以前的事了。是吗？不，没有那么久。我自己现在还没29岁呢。

articles.title: Seventy miles an hour
articles.question: What does Ann advise her husband to do next time? 安建议她的丈夫下次做什么？

sentences.text: Look, Harry! That policeman's waving to you. He wants you to stop.
sentences.translation: 瞧，加里！那个警察正朝你挥手呢。他要你停下来。

sentences.text: Where do you think you are? On a race track? You must have been driving at seventy miles an hour.
sentences.translation: 你认为你现在是在哪儿？在赛车道上吗？你刚才一定是以每小时70英里的速度开车。

sentences.text: I can't have been.
I was doing eighty when I overtook you.
sentences.translation: 我是以第小时80英里的速度赶上你的。

sentences.text: Didn't you see the speed limit?
sentences.translation: 难道你没看见限速牌吗？

sentences.text: I'm afraid I didn't, officer. I must have been dreaming.
sentences.translation: 恐怕我没有看见，警官。我一定思想开小差了。

sentences.text: He wasn't dreaming, officer. I was telling him to drive slowly.
sentences.translation: 警官，他思想没有开小差。我刚才正告诉他开慢点。

sentences.text: That's why I didn't see the sign.
sentences.translation: 所以我才没看见那牌子。

sentences.text: Let me see your driving-license and your insurance certificate.
sentences.translation: 让我看一看你的驾驶执照。

sentences.text: I won't charge you this time. But you'd better not do it again!
sentences.translation: 这次我就不罚你款了。但你最好不要再开得这样快。

sentences.text: Thank you. I'll certainly be more careful.
sentences.translation: 谢谢您。我以后一定会多加注意。

sentences.text: I told you to drive slowly, Harry.
sentences.translation: 加里，我刚才叫你开慢点吧。

sentences.text: You always tell me to drive slowly, darling.
sentences.translation: 你总是叫我开慢点，亲爱的。

sentences.text: Well, next time you'd better take my advice!
sentences.translation: 好啦，下次你最好还是听从我的劝告！

articles.original_chinese: 瞧，加里！那个警察正朝你挥手呢。他要你停下来。你认为你现在是在哪儿？在赛车道上吗？你刚才一定是以每小时70英里的速度开车。我不会开得那么快的。我是以第小时80英里的速度赶上你的。难道你没看见限速牌吗？恐怕我没有看见，警官。我一定思想开小差了。警官，他思想没有开小差。我刚才正告诉他开慢点。所以我才没看见那牌子。让我看一看你的驾驶执照。这次我就不罚你款了。但你最好不要再开得这样快。谢谢您。我以后一定会多加注意。加里，我刚才叫你开慢点吧。你总是叫我开慢点，亲爱的。好啦，下次你最好还是听从我的劝告！

articles.title: Don't be so sure!
articles.question: What's the problem about deciding on a holiday? 决定如何度假有什么为难的地方？

sentences.text: Where are you going to spend your holidays this year, Gary?
sentences.translation: 加里，今年你们打算去哪里度假？

sentences.text: We may go abroad. I'm not sure. My wife wants to go to Egypt. I'd like to go there, too. We can't make up our minds.
sentences.translation: 我们可能到国外去，但我不敢肯定。 我妻子想到埃及去，我也想去那儿。我们还拿不定主意。

sentences.text: Will you travel by sea or by air?
sentences.translation: 你们乘船去，还是乘飞机去？

sentences.text: We may travel by sea.
It's cheaper, isn't it?
It may be cheaper, but it takes a long time.
sentences.translation: 可能是便宜些，但花的时间长。

sentences.text: I'm sure you will enjoy yourselves.
sentences.translation: 我肯定你们一定会玩得很痛快。

sentences.text: Don't be so sure. We may not go anywhere. My wife always worries too much. Who's going to look after the dog? Who's going to look after the house? Who's going to look after the garden? We have this problem every year. In the end, we stay at home and look after everything!
sentences.translation: 别那么肯定。我们可能哪里也去不成。我妻子总是担心那的。谁来照看狗啦， 谁来看管房子啦，谁来照料花园啦， 我们每年都碰到这类问题。末了， 我们呆在家里来照看一切。

articles.original_chinese: 加里，今年你们打算去哪里度假？我们可能到国外去，但我不敢肯定。 我妻子想到埃及去，我也想去那儿。我们还拿不定主意。你们乘船去，还是乘飞机去？我们可能乘船去。这更便宜些，是吗？可能是便宜些，但花的时间长。我肯定你们一定会玩得很痛快。别那么肯定。我们可能哪里也去不成。我妻子总是担心那的。谁来照看狗啦， 谁来看管房子啦，谁来照料花园啦， 我们每年都碰到这类问题。末了， 我们呆在家里来照看一切。

articles.title: Sensational news!
articles.question: What reason did Karen Marsh give for wanting to retire? 卡伦.马什说她为什么想要退休？

sentences.text: Have you just made a new film, Miss Marsh?
sentences.translation: 您刚拍完一部新电影吗，马什小姐？

sentences.text: Yes, I have.
Are you going to make another?
No, I'm not. I'm going to retire. I feel very tired. I don't want to make another film for a long time.
sentences.translation: 不，我不准备拍了。我准备退休了。我感觉累得很。 我早就不想再拍片子了。

sentences.text: Let's buy a newspaper, Millie. Listen to this! "Karen Marsh: Sensational News! By our reporter, Alan Jones. Miss Karen Marsh arrived at London Airport today. She was wearing a blue dress and a mink coat. She told me she had just made a new film. She said she was not going to make another. She said she was going to retire. She told reporters she felt very tired and didn't want to make another film for a long time."
sentences.translation: 我们买份报纸吧。莉兹。 你听这段："卡伦.马什： 爆炸性新闻！由本报记者艾伦. 琼斯报导。卡伦.马什今天到达伦敦机场。她穿着一身蓝色的套装和一件貂皮大衣。她告诉我她刚拍完一部新片子。她不准备再拍电影了。她说她准备退休。她告诉记者她感到很疲劳，早就不想再拍电影了。"

sentences.text: Well, fancy that, Kate!

articles.original_chinese: 您刚拍完一部新电影吗，马什小姐？是的，我刚拍完。您准备再拍一部吗？不，我不准备拍了。我准备退休了。我感觉累得很。 我早就不想再拍片子了。我们买份报纸吧。莉兹。 你听这段："卡伦.马什： 爆炸性新闻！由本报记者艾伦. 琼斯报导。卡伦.马什今天到达伦敦机场。她穿着一身蓝色的套装和一件貂皮大衣。她告诉我她刚拍完一部新片子。她不准备再拍电影了。她说她准备退休。她告诉记者她感到很疲劳，早就不想再拍电影了。"真没想到！

articles.title: The latest report
articles.question: Is Karen Marsh going to retire, do you think? 你认为卡伦.马什会退休吗？

sentences.text: Are you really going to retire, Miss Marsh?
sentences.translation: 马什小姐，您真的准备退休吗？

sentences.text: I may. I can't make up my mind. I shall have to ask my future husband. He won't let me make another film.
sentences.translation: 有可能退。我还拿不定主意。我得问一下我的未婚夫。他不会再让我拍电影了。

sentences.text: Your future husband, Miss Marsh?
Yes. Let me introduce him to you. His name is Carlos. We are going to get married next week.
sentences.translation: 是的，让我把他给你们介绍一下。他叫卡洛斯。下星期我们就要结婚了。

sentences.text: Look, Millie! Here's another report about Karen Marsh. Listen: "Karen Marsh: The Latest. At her London Hotel today Miss Marsh told reporters she might retire. She said she couldn't make up her mind. She said she would have to ask her future husband. She said her future husband would not let her make another film. Then she introduced us to Carlos and told us they would get married next week."
sentences.translation: 看啊，米莉！这又有一篇关于卡伦.马什的报道。你听: "卡伦. 马什：最新消息。今天在伦敦旅馆，马什小姐告诉记者她可能要退休。她说她还拿不定主意。她说她得问问她的未婚夫。她说她的未婚夫不会再让她拍电影。 然后她把我们介绍给卡洛斯，并告诉我们说他们下星期结婚。"

sentences.text: That's sensational news, isn't it, Kate?
sentences.translation: 凯特，这真是条轰动的消息， 是不是？

sentences.text: It certainly is. He'll be her sixth husband!
sentences.translation: 当然啦。他将是她的第6个丈夫！

articles.original_chinese: 马什小姐，您真的准备退休吗？有可能退。我还拿不定主意。我得问一下我的未婚夫。他不会再让我拍电影了。您的未婚夫，马什小姐？是的，让我把他给你们介绍一下。他叫卡洛斯。下星期我们就要结婚了。看啊，米莉！这又有一篇关于卡伦.马什的报道。你听: "卡伦. 马什：最新消息。今天在伦敦旅馆，马什小姐告诉记者她可能要退休。她说她还拿不定主意。她说她得问问她的未婚夫。她说她的未婚夫不会再让她拍电影。 然后她把我们介绍给卡洛斯，并告诉我们说他们下星期结婚。"凯特，这真是条轰动的消息， 是不是？当然啦。他将是她的第6个丈夫！

articles.title: A pleasant dream
articles.question: What would Julie like to do, if she had the money? 如果朱莉有那笔钱，她想做什么呢？

sentences.text: Are you doing the football pools, Brian?
sentences.translation: 布赖恩，你正在下足球赛的赌注吗？

sentences.text: Yes, I've nearly finished, June. I'm sure we will win something this week.
sentences.translation: 是的。我这就做完了。朱莉。我敢肯定这星期我们会赢一点的。

sentences.text: You always say that, but we never win anything! What will you do if you win a lot of money?
sentences.translation: 你老是那样说，但是我们从来没赢过！要是你赢了许多钱，你打算做什么呢？

sentences.text: If I win a lot of money, I shall buy you a mink coat.
sentences.translation: 要是我赢了许多钱，我给你买件貂皮大衣。

sentences.text: I don't want a mink coat! I want to see the world.
sentences.translation: 我不要貂皮大衣。我要去见见世面。

sentences.text: All right. If we win a lot of money, we shall travel around the world and we shall stay at the best hotels. Then we shall return home and buy a big house in the country. We shall have a beautiful garden and…
sentences.translation: 好吧。要是我们赢了很多钱，我们就去周游世界，并且住最好的旅馆。然后我们返回家园，在乡下买幢大房子。我们将有一个漂亮的花园和…

sentences.text: But if we spend all that money we shall be poor again. What shall we do then?
sentences.translation: 但是如果我们把所有钱都花光了，我们又会变穷的。那时我们怎么办呢？

sentences.text: If we spend all the money, we shall try and win the football pools again.
sentences.translation: 如果我们花光了所有钱，我们设法在足球赛赌注上再赢一次。

sentences.text: It's a pleasant dream, but everything depends on "if"!
sentences.translation: 这是个美好的梦，但一切都取决于"如果"！

articles.original_chinese: 布赖恩，你正在下足球赛的赌注吗？是的。我这就做完了。朱莉。我敢肯定这星期我们会赢一点的。你老是那样说，但是我们从来没赢过！要是你赢了许多钱，你打算做什么呢？要是我赢了许多钱，我给你买件貂皮大衣。我不要貂皮大衣。我要去见见世面。好吧。要是我们赢了很多钱，我们就去周游世界，并且住最好的旅馆。然后我们返回家园，在乡下买幢大房子。我们将有一个漂亮的花园和…但是如果我们把所有钱都花光了，我们又会变穷的。那时我们怎么办呢？如果我们花光了所有钱，我们设法在足球赛赌注上再赢一次。这是个美好的梦，但一切都取决于"如果"！

articles.title: Is that you, John?
articles.question: Which John Smith does Graham Turner think he is talking to? 格雷厄姆.特纳以为他在和哪一个约翰.史密斯通话？

sentences.text: Is that you, John?
Yes, speaking.
Tell Mary we shall be late for dinner this evening.
sentences.translation: 你告诉玛丽，今晚吃饭将晚到一会儿。

sentences.text: I'm afraid I don't understand.
sentences.translation: 恐怕我还不明白您的意思。

sentences.text: Hasn't Mary told you? She invited Betty and me to dinner this evening. I said I would be at your house at six o'clock, but the boss wants me to do some extra work. I'll have to stay at the office. I don't know when I shall finish. Oh, and by the way, my wife wants to know if Mary needs any help.
sentences.translation: 玛丽没有告诉你吗？她邀请我和夏洛特今晚去吃饭。我说过我6点到你家，但老板要我加班。我不得不留在办公室，不知道什么时候才能结束。喔，顺便问一问，我妻子想知道玛丽是否需要帮忙。

sentences.text: I don't know what you're talking about.
sentences.translation: 我不知道您在说些什么。

sentences.text: That is John Smith, isn't it?
Yes, I'm John Smith.
You are John Smith, the engineer, aren't you?
sentences.translation: 你是工程师约翰.史密斯，对吗？

sentences.text: That's right.
You work for the Overseas Engineering Company, don't you?
sentences.translation: 你在海外工程公司上班，是吗？

sentences.text: No, I don't. I'm John Smith the telephone engineer and I'm repairing your telephone line.
sentences.translation: 不，不是。我是电话工程师约翰.史密斯，我正在修理您的电话线。

articles.original_chinese: 是你吗，约翰？是我，请讲。你告诉玛丽，今晚吃饭将晚到一会儿。恐怕我还不明白您的意思。玛丽没有告诉你吗？她邀请我和夏洛特今晚去吃饭。我说过我6点到你家，但老板要我加班。我不得不留在办公室，不知道什么时候才能结束。喔，顺便问一问，我妻子想知道玛丽是否需要帮忙。我不知道您在说些什么。你是约翰.史密斯，对吗？是的，我是约翰.史密斯。你是工程师约翰.史密斯，对吗？对。你在海外工程公司上班，是吗？不，不是。我是电话工程师约翰.史密斯，我正在修理您的电话线。

articles.title: Sally's first train ride
articles.chinese_title: 莎莉第一次乘火车旅行
articles.question: Why was the mother embarrassed? 为什么母亲感到尴尬？

sentences.text: Last week, my four-year-old daughter, Sally, was invited to a children's party.
I decided to take her by train.
Sally was very excited because she had never traveled on a train before.
She sat near the window and asked questions about everything she saw.
Suddenly, a middle-aged lady got on the train and sat opposite Sally.
'Hello, little girl.'
Sally did not answer, but looked at her curiously.
The lady was dressed in a blue coat and a large, funny hat.
After the train had left the station, the lady opened her handbag and took out her powder compact.
She then began to make up her face.
'Why are you doing that?'
Sally asked.
'To make myself beautiful,'the lady answered.
She put away her compact and smiled kindly.
'But you are still ugly.'
Sally said.
Sally was amused, but I was very embarrassed!

articles.title: A walk through the woods
articles.question: What was so funny about the words on the sign? 牌子上的字有什么可笑的地方？

sentences.text: I live in a very old town which is surrounded by beautiful woods.
It is a famous beauty spot.
On Sundays, hundreds of people come from the city to see our town and to walk through the woods.
Visitors have been asked to keep the woods clean and tidy.
Litter baskets have been placed under the trees, but people still throw their rubbish everywhere.
Last Wednesday, I went for a walk in the woods.
What I saw made me very sad.
I counted seven old cars and three old refrigerators.
The little baskets were empty and the ground was covered with pieces of paper, cigarette ends, old tyres, empty bottles and rusty tins.
Among the rubbish, I found a sign which said, 'Anyone who leaves litter in these woods will be prosecuted!'

articles.original_chinese: 林中散步我住在一个由美丽的树林环绕的古老的小镇上。这是一个著名的风景胜地。每适星期天，有许许多人从城里来观赏我们的小镇，并在树林中散步。游客已被告知要保持树林的整洁。树下都已设置了废物筐，但是人们仍到处扔垃圾。上星期三我到树林里去散步。我所见到的一切使我非常难过。我数了一下，有7辆旧汽车和3个旧冰箱。废物筐是空的，而满地都是纸片、烟头、旧轮胎，空瓶子和生锈的空罐头盒。在垃圾堆中我发现了一块牌子，上面写着：“凡在此树林里丢弃垃圾者，将依法处置”。
